title: Digital Project Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Digital Project Manager to oversee the day-to-day delivery of automation projects for our MSP (Managed Service Provider) clients. You'll make sure our engineers are always working on the right tasks, clients are kept updated, and nothing falls through the cracks.



This is a high-ownership role. You sit between our engineering team and our clients — assigning work, clearing blockers, tracking progress, and sending clear status updates to each MSP client.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Engineer & Team Management

-Assign tasks to engineers based on availability and client priority

-Monitor daily activity to make sure all engineers are actively working — no one is idle

-Identify and remove blockers preventing engineers from moving forward

-Track workload per engineer and flag issues before they affect delivery

-Run regular check-ins to review task status, deadlines, and progress



Client Management & Communication

-Manage the relationship between our team and our MSP clients

-Proactively update clients on task progress, milestones, and delays — before they ask

-Communicate updates in a clear, easy-to-understand way for clients

-Keep detailed workflow notes so every client briefing is ready and accurate



Project & Task Oversight

-Maintain the master task tracker — every task needs an engineer, due date, priority, and updated status

-Prioritize requests based on SLA agreements and business impact

-Conduct weekly reviews of all open, blocked, and at-risk tasks

-Escalate high-priority issues to leadership when needed



Documentation

-Log workflow updates for team visibility and client reference

-Keep client profiles up to date: contacts, SLA terms, contract types, and assigned engineers

-Spot recurring issues and recommend process improvements





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

-Experience in project management, operations, or a client-facing coordination role

-Experience managing or coordinating teams

-Strong organizational skills — you can juggle multiple clients and projects at once

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Comfortable with task tracking tools (spreadsheets, project management platforms)

-A proactive attitude — you keep things moving and stay on top of everything

Send your application to 
 including your expected salary.

title: Operations Manager - 8-Figure Ecommerce Brand
description:
## About Us



We are a fast-growing DTC nutraceutical company focused on women's health supplements. We've scaled from $0 to over seven figures per month in under a year, and we're just getting started. We're building a world-class remote team and need an Operations Manager who can own the machine that keeps everything running.



## Why This Role Is Critical



Our founder's highest-leverage work is creative strategy and growth. Right now, too much of his time is spent on operational firefighting—managing people, chasing supply chain updates, processing payments, and keeping systems running. This role exists to take full ownership of day-to-day operations so the business can scale without the founder being a bottleneck.



## What You'll Own



### Systems & SOPs



- Build, document, and maintain SOPs for every role and process in Notion

- Ensure every role has a clear playbook so new hires can onboard without tribal knowledge

- Audit and improve existing processes—identify bottlenecks and fix them



### People Management & Accountability



- Manage all tea
mbers day-to-day—you are the primary point of contact for the team

- Track and enforce KPIs on a weekly basis using job scorecards

- Run weekly team standups and 1:1 check-ins

- Conduct monthly and quarterly performance reviews

- Handle underperformance conversations and performance improvement plans

- Process contractor and team payments



### Hiring & Onboarding



- Manage the hiring pipeline when roles open: post jobs, screen applicants, coordinate assessments, schedule interviews

- Build and execute structured onboarding plans for every new hire

- Maintain and update job descriptions and scorecards for all roles



### Supply Chain & Fulfillment



- Own inventory tracking, demand forecasting, and reorder management

- Manage freight logistics and coordinate shipments (China ? US warehouses)

- Manage 3PL relationships—monitor SLAs, resolve issues, optimize costs

- Prevent stockouts and overstock situations through proactive forecasting



### Cost Visibility



- Track recurring business expenses (tools, subscriptions, vendors) and flag anomalies

- Deliver a monthly OPEX summary—where money is going and what looks off



## Requirements



- 2+ years in an operations or project management role in e-commerce or DTC

- Advanced Notion user (required)—you build systems in it, not just use it

- Actively uses AI tools daily to automate work, build systems, and solve problems

- Experience managing remote teams across multiple time zones

- Experience with supply chain: inventory management, 3PL coordination, freight, and demand forecasting

- Comfortable reading basic financials: OPEX tracking, vendor costs, budget vs. actual

- Has experience with hiring processes



## Character Traits We're Looking For



- **Ownership mentality** — treats the business like their own, doesn't wait to be told

- **Systems thinker** — sees a messy process and instinctively documents and fixes it

- **Proactive communicator** — surfaces problems before they escalate, provides updates without being asked

- **Comfortable with hard conversations** — holds people accountable while keeping them motivated

- **Organized to the extreme** — nothing falls through the cracks

- **Resourceful** — figures things out before asking for help



## This Is NOT For You If:



- You need to be told what to do every day

- You think operations is just admin work

- You're not comfortable managing people and having difficult conversations

- You don't actively use AI tools in your daily workflow

- You've never worked in e-commerce or DTC

- You've never built systems or SOPs from scratch

- You can't work autonomously across time zones



## Compensation & Perks



- $50,000–$70,000/year base

- Paid annual leave: 14 calendar days

- Fully remote

- Paid sick days



### How to Apply



If this sounds like you, please fill out the form below and you will hear back from us soon!



[
](
)



SLD Ecommerce is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion.



We encourage all applications irrespective of gender, race, sexual orientation, religion, age, nationality, marital status, and disability. We believe that diversity is at the heart of innovation and we welcome passionate candidates from all backgrounds. Come join the family and see for yourself!

WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR

PAID ADS & GROWTH

GHL (CRM & AUTOMATION)

CREATIVE & CONTENT (VERY IMPORTANT)

AI & AUTOMATION

WEBSITE & SEO

LEAD MANAGEMENT

REQUIREMENTS (STRICT)

title: ADS MANAGER (Project-Based / Part-Time)
description:
Job Opportunity: ADS MANAGER (Project-Based / Part-Time)



We’re hiring an Ads Manager who is obsessed with driving ROAS, lowering CPAs, and scaling campaigns efficiently.



This is a project-based role designed for the performance marketing wizard who ensures every dollar spent is maximized across our advertising ecosystem.



If you understand that "creative is the new targeting," then you are our person. You are here to bridge the gap between our ad platforms (Meta/Google), our creatives, and our CRM (GoHighLevel), ensuring that our lead flow is consistent, qualified, and profitable. Your priorities are campaign architecture, aggressive A/B testing, and scaling budgets without sacrificing performance.





IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.





ABOUT THE TEAM

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! [youtu.be/smT-w2M_TcQ]





Our Core Values: 



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.







ABOUT YOU 



Do you get a dopamine hit when your campaigns break a 3x ROAS? Do you have a deep understanding of campaign structures, bid caps, and algorithm learning phases? Are you the person who finds the winning creative angle that everyone else missed? Do you take pride in writing scroll-stopping ad copy and split-testing hooks that empower our business to scale with confidence? Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!







PROJECT RESPONSIBILITIES



Phase 1: Account Architecture & Strategy Audit Perform a deep-dive audit of current ad accounts (Meta & Google Ads) to identify wasted spend and missed opportunities. Build out and organize clean campaign structures (CBO/ABO, Search/Performance Max) for testing and scaling. Conduct audience, competitor, and market research to develop fresh creative angles and targeting strategies.



Phase 2: Optimization, Testing & Scaling Launch and manage daily campaigns, closely monitoring key metrics like CTR, CPA, CPC, and ROAS. Execute rigorous A/B tests on creative assets (images/video), ad copy, and headlines to consistently beat control metrics. Scale winning campaigns efficiently without breaking algorithm learning phases or spiking acquisition costs.



Phase 3: Reporting & Creative Direction Provide weekly, data-backed reports that break down performance, highlight insights, and outline strategic next steps. Collaborate with the design/video team to provide feedback and creative direction based on what is actually converting. Monitor lead quality in GoHighLevel to ensure we aren't just driving cheap clicks, but actual qualified prospects.





REQUIREMENTS



Required Experience & Capability EXPERT-level knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads. Deep experience with managing daily budgets, scaling campaigns, and navigating algorithm fluctuations. Strong direct-response copywriting skills—you know how to write hooks that grab attention and copy that converts. Familiarity with GoHighLevel to track lead quality and monitor the full funnel from click to close. Experience reading data to make swift, emotionless media buying decisions.

High attention to detail—you hate wasted ad spend and unexplained performance dips. Strong English communication skills to clearly explain strategy and performance to the wider team. A stable, high-speed internet connection (at least 150mbps).





Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience with TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, or YouTube Ads. Familiarity with 3rd-party attribution tools (Hyros, Triple Whale, or SegMetrics). Basic graphic design or video editing skills (Canva, CapCut) for rapid creative iterating.





NOTE: This is a Project-Based / Part-Time role (20 hrs/week). We are looking for a specialist who can execute the initial campaign overhauls and provide ongoing, daily management as we scale.





APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS



STEP 1: Application Please submit your application HERE

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 30mins case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world media buying scenario or campaign challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, analytical logic, and how you tackle practical scaling situations in Meta/Google in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: Project Onboarding & Trial If an offer is made and accepted, you will be onboarded as our Ads Manager to execute the initial strategy and campaign setups. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the technical responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values—as we evaluate long-term scaling needs.

title: Senior Funding Advisor / High-Ticket Closer (Business Credit & 0% APR Funding)
description:

We’re looking for experienced Senior Funding Advisors / Closers who can confidently handle qualified inbound leads, educate prospects, and close high-ticket deals ($3K–$10K+ fees).



If you understand credit, can control a sales conversation, and know how to close without sounding salesy, this role is for you.



What You'll Be Doing:

Taking pre-qualified inbound calls (no cold calling)

Analyzing client situations (credit profile, business age, funding goals)

Educating prospects on how 0% APR business credit funding works

Handling objections and guiding prospects toward the best funding strategy

Closing clients into our done-with-you funding program

Updating CRM and maintaining clean pipeline management

Working closely with fulfillment team for smooth onboarding



What You Must Understand:



This is NOT traditional lending.



We help clients access funding via:



Business credit cards (not loans)

0% interest for 9–12+ months

Approval based heavily on:

Personal credit profile

Business age

Credit utilization

Authorized users (AU)

Inquiry management

Funding tiers ($20K ? $100K+ scaling)

Strong understanding of:

Business credit

Personal credit optimization

High-ticket sales ($2K+ deals)



Fluent in English (neutral or American accent preferred)

Not order-taking — we need someone who can lead the conversation

???? Compensation:

$1500/mo base for the first 90 days and then $2000

Bonus on Performance

If you’re someone who:

This is NOT a fit.



???? To Apply:

Your average deal size closed

Many of our tea
mbers started with us this same way on a gig basis, and over time it turned into something much more steady and long-term. For the right person, this can absolutely grow into a longer-term opportunity and become a strong source of supplemental income.

We are looking for someone who can help us build the full LinkedIn strategy for our brand from the ground up, including:



Setting up and optimizing our 
pany page

property managers

real estate management companies

hotel managers

senior living / retirement home operators

maintenance directors

facilities managers

Creating and improving outreach messaging

Helping with connection strategies, follow-ups, and relationship-building

Advising on how to use LinkedIn to generate real opportunities, not just random activity

Helping us d
 the best balance of:

company page setup

personal profile outreach

organic posting

B2B prospecting

and possible LinkedIn ads later if appropriate

Joining Zoom calls with our team to review strategy, screen share, troubleshoot, and improve performance in real time

We are looking for someone who is:



senior-level

highly experienced

strategic

confident

able to guide the process

able to contribute at a high level from the start



You should already understand how to use LinkedIn as a real B2B growth tool, especially for outreach, lead generation, and building relationships with business decision-makers.

Gig basis to start

God bless,

Eric B.

title: Sales Manager (High-Ticket Phone Sales | Performance-Based Team)
description:
Job Description



We are a fast-scaling financial services company specializing in 0% interest business funding, generating thousands of inbound leads monthly through paid acquisition.



We are looking for a Sales Manager to take full ownership of our closing team performance.



This role is not about theory — it is about driving revenue, enforcing accountability, and increasing close rates immediately.



You will be managing a team of closers and SDRs handling pre-qualified inbound appointments (no cold calling).



???? Core Responsibilities

Manage and oversee daily closer performance

Track and improve:

Close rate

Show rate

Revenue per lead

Hold closers accountable to activity + results (calls, follow-ups, conversions)

Run daily sales huddles / call reviews / pipeline reviews

Identify underperformance quickly and take action (coach or replace)

Improve sales scripts, objection handling, and call structure

Ensure speed-to-lead and urgency across the team

Work directly with leadership to align sales output with lead volume scaling



?? Key Context (Read Carefully)

We generate high-volume inbound leads daily

Closers are booking 9–15+ calls per day

The current bottleneck is low conversion — not lead flow



???? Your job is to fix conversion and maximize revenue from existing volume



? Requirements



MUST HAVE:

Native American English Fluency (No Accent)

Proven experience managing high-ticket phone sales teams

Strong track record of improving:

Close rates

Sales team productivity

Experience with appointment-based sales (inbound or setter/closer model)

Ability to coach, enforce standards, and remove underperformers



Deep understanding of:

Call structure

Objection handling

Follow-up systems



BONUS:



Experience in:

Business funding / credit / lending

Info products / consulting sales



Performance-based sales teams

???? Role Structure

Fully remote



U.S. business hours (EST overlap required)

8am to 6pm Monday To Friday

9am to 3pm Saturday

Works directly with founders/leadership

Oversee 2–6 closers (scaling quickly)

Oversee 6 SDRs

title: Fulfillment Coordinator (U.S. Credit & Funding Operations)
description:
We are a fast-growing financial services company specializing in 0% interest credit stacking and business funding solutions. We operate on a performance-based model, helping clients secure funding through structured credit strategies.

We are hiring a Fulfillment Coordinator to manage the backend execution of approved deals. This role is client-facing and focuses on onboarding, coordination, and oversight—not heavy technical work.

This is a streamlined, systems-driven role supported by an offshore processing team that handles application submissions.



???? Core Responsibilities

Conduct client onboarding calls (15–30 minutes) after deal approval

Clearly explain credit strategy, timelines, and expectations

Serve as the primary point of contact for clients throughout fulfillment

Coordinate with offshore team executing credit card & funding applications

Monitor deal progress and ensure timely submission + follow-ups

Maintain accurate records in CRM and internal systems

Handle sensitive client data (SSN, DOB, financial details) with professionalism and discretion



? Requirements

MUST HAVE:

Experience working with U.S. credit systems (credit repair, funding, tradelines, lending, etc.)

Strong understanding of:

Personal credit profiles

Business funding / credit stacking (preferred)

Bank & lender application processes

Excellent spoken and written English (client-facing role)

Comfortable discussing financial and sensitive information with U.S. clients

Organized, responsive, and able to manage multiple clients simultaneously

NICE TO HAVE:

Experience in credit stacking or business funding companies

Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, etc.)

Experience working with offshore teams



???? Role Structure

Part-Time (20–25 hours/week)

Fully remote

U.S. business hours (EST availability required)

High deal volume environment (consistent pipeline, no lead shortage)



???? Compensation

We offer a lean base + performance structure aligned with company revenue:

Base: $2000/month (part-time)

Performance bonus:

$50–$100 per successfully funded client

title: Video Editor
description:
Dear,



For our fast-growing e-commerce brand, we are on track to hit 8 figures this year. Therefore, we are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor with proven experience creating high-converting video ad creatives for e-commerce brands to become a core part of our creatives team.



We are not looking for beginner editors or basic freelancers. We are looking for someone who understands performance marketing, direct response advertising, and how to create video ads that actually generate revenue through paid advertising.



You must understand what makes video advertisements perform well and be extremely creative, detail-oriented, and efficient when producing video creatives.



To prove you have read this carefully, please apply with the word cranberry before you introduce yourself.



Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we require for this job.



Please answer the following questions if you are interested:



Do you have experience creating video ad creatives for e-commerce brands?



Have you previously worked with 6–7 figure Shopify brands?



Please include 3–5 video ads you created that were used in paid advertising campaigns.



If available, can you share performance metrics such as CTR, CPA, or ROAS for the ads you created?



Which software do you primarily use for editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, etc.)?



What do you believe makes a video ad perform well in paid advertising?



Are you comfortable creating multiple video variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns?



Are you available full-time, 6–7 days a week, and responsive during business hours?



As a Video Editor you must have:



Strong experience creating video ad creatives for e-commerce brands (Must)



High-level proficiency in video editing software such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent (Must)



Deep understanding of direct response advertising and performance creatives (Must)



Ability to create high-converting video ads for paid advertising campaigns (Must)



Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, retention, and storytelling for short-form content (Must)



Ability to edit engaging ads using subtitles, sound effects, transitions, and visual effects (Must)



Ability to produce multiple ad variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns (Must)



Highly responsive and professional communication (Must)



Prior experience working with 6–7 figure brands or marketing agencies (Pre)



If you do not meet the requirements, please do not apply. (thank you)



Your duties will be:



Creating high-converting video ad creatives for platforms such as
 and Instagram



Editing performance-focused video ads using provided raw footage and briefs



Producing multiple video variations for testing and scaling advertising campaigns



Implementing strong hooks, fast-paced edits, subtitles, and engaging visual elements



Following creative briefs and brand guidelines provided by the marketing team



Collaborating with the team to develop new creative angles and advertising concepts



Maintaining organized project files and editing workflows



Delivering creatives quickly and consistently to support advertising campaigns



Ensuring all creatives meet brand standards and performance goals



FULL SOPs AND CREATIVE REFERENCES PROVIDED



PAID CREATIVE TEST REQUIRED FOR SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES



ROOM TO GROW INTO A SENIOR CREATIVE ROLE



FAST-PACED TEAM BUILDING AN 8-FIGURE BRAND



If you believe you are the right fit for this role and can create world-class video ad creatives that drive real revenue, please respond to this post.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: Senior Google Ads Expert Needed for DIY Home Improvement E-Commerce Brand
description:
Job Title:

Senior Google Ads Expert Needed for DIY Home Improvement E-Commerce Brand



Job Description:

We are looking for a true senior-level Google Ads expert to join us on a gig basis.



This is for an e-commerce brand in the DIY home improvement space, and we need someone who really knows Google Ads inside and out. We already have experience in this area ourselves and also have a team of experts, but we are looking to add another highly skilled person who can bring strong strategy, strong execution, and real value to the team.



This is not a beginner or intermediate position.

Please do not apply unless you have at least 5+ years of hands-on Google Ads experience and consider yourself a true expert.



We need someone who is highly experienced with:



Google Search Ads

keyword research

campaign setup

ad copy creation

conversion-focused strategy

targeting

optimization

scaling

troubleshooting

improving ROAS

reducing wasted ad spend

helping e-commerce brands grow through Google Ads



You should know how to build campaigns correctly from the ground up, create compelling ad copy, improve performance over time, and help guide strategy at a high level.



This role will begin on a gig basis at $12 to $15 USD per hour and will involve Zoom calls, screen-sharing sessions, and working directly with our team in real time. This will usually be an hour here and there as needed for setup, strategy, review, troubleshooting, and optimization.



Many of our tea
mbers started with us this same way on a gig basis, and over time it turned into something much more steady and long-term. For the right person, this can absolutely grow into a longer-term opportunity and become a strong source of supplemental income.



What we need help with:



Setting up and managing Google Ads campaigns properly

Keyword research and campaign structure

Writing compelling ad copy that gets attention and drives results

Improving targeting and reducing wasted spend

Helping increase traffic, conversions, and sales

Reviewing landing page alignment and campaign performance

Troubleshooting weak spots and identifying opportunities

Consulting with our team on strategy and next steps

Joining Zoom calls and screen-sharing sessions to work side by side in real time

Helping us build and improve the Google Ads side of the business over time



Important:

We are looking for someone who is:



senior-level

highly experienced

strategic

confident

able to guide the process

able to contribute at a high level from the start



We are not looking for someone who is just familiar with Google Ads.

We are looking for someone who truly knows their way around the platform and can help us build this the right way.



Our brand:

We are building and promoting an e-commerce brand in the DIY home improvement space. More details will be shared during the interview process with qualified candidates.



Pay:

$12 to $15 USD per hour

Gig basis to start



To Apply:

Please reply with:



Your years of Google Ads experience

Your experience with e-commerce brands

Why you consider yourself a true expert

Examples of similar work you have done

Your resume, portfolio, or case studies if available

Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

Your desired hourly rate in U.S. dollars



Again, please do not apply unless you are truly advanced or expert-level. We are looking for someone seasoned who really knows their stuff and can help us build this the right way.



God bless,

Eric B.

title: Legal Accounts Officer (Trust & Accounts Payable)
description:
About the Role



As the Accounts Officer, you will play a critical role in supporting the financial operations of our client’s growing firm. Working closely with the Finance Manager, you will manage day-to-day accounts payable activities, ensure accurate financial processing, and maintain the integrity of our financial records.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, enjoys working with numbers, and has experience in Australian law firm accounting. You will be the primary point of contact for accounts payable inquiries, manage transactional processing, and support month-end and audit-related tasks.



If you thrive in a structured environment, demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, and take pride in delivering accurate, high-quality work, we’d love to meet you!





Key Responsibilities

Accounts Payable Management:



Process all supplier invoices for general business expenses.

Manage and process matter-related EFT payment requests for both the office account and trust account.

Monitor, manage, and action all
s in the Accounts Payable shared inbox.

Act as the main contact for internal and external queries related to accounts payable.

Financial Processing & Reconciliation:



Code disbursements and trust transactions in the practice management system.

Complete daily bank reconciliations for payable and trust transactions.

Reconcile credit card expenses, including follow-ups with employees for receipt and expense verification.

Month-End & Audit Support



Assist with month-end accounts processes, including trust reporting.

Support audit requirements, variance analysis, and documentation preparation.

Contribute to timely completion of assigned month-end tasks.

General Finance Support:



Attend to finance-related queries from employees and clients in a timely manner.

Provide support to the Finance Manager on ad hoc tasks as required.

Maintain accurate financial records and contribute to continuous process improvement.



Other Responsibilities



Assist with audit preparation and documentation.

Ensure compliance with internal financial procedures and relevant regulations.

Contribute to a positive and collaborative team environment.

Take initiative in identifying efficiency improvements in finance workflows.



About You



Strong attention to detail with high standards for accuracy.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Highly organized with good time management and the ability to work autonomously.

Experience in an Australian law firm (required)

A positive attitude, willingness to learn, and a proactive approach.

Comfortable liaising with internal teams, clients, and external stakeholders.

Intermediate proficiency in Excel and the Microsoft Office suite (required).

Experience using Xero and legal practice management software (required).

Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a similar accounts or bookkeeping role within an Australian law firm (required).

A university degree is preferred but not essential.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: E-commerce Operations Controller & Sourcing Manager (Bilingual EN/FR)
description:
About us



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the beauty and personal care industry. We operate two online stores (France and Germany) processing 100 to 150 orders per day. We work with sourcing agents in China and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented right-hand person to manage our sourcing operations and financial tracking on a part-time basis.



The role



You will be added directly to our WhatsApp group chats with our sourcing agents in China. You will be the person making sure everything adds up — every invoice, every cost, every payment. You will communicate in English with our agents and in French with our internal team and management. Both languages are used daily — this is non-negotiable.



Your missions



Sourcing & agent management:



Communicate daily in English with our sourcing agents in China via WhatsApp

Negotiate product prices, packaging, shipping costs and terms (MOQ, lead times)

Track stock orders, shipments and delivery timelines

Manage factory relationships (samples, certifications, custom packaging)

Translate and relay key information between the agents (English) and internal team (French)



Financial audit & cost control:



Verify every invoice from our agents daily (product costs, shipping fees, remote area fees, etc.)

Cross-check invoices against actual orders to detect discrepancies or overcharges

Audit all our monthly subscriptions and paid tools to maintain full cost traceability

Monitor balances and ongoing payments



Dashboards & profitability tracking:



Build and maintain Excel / Google Sheets dashboards tracking profitability per product and per store

Create COGS calculators including all costs (product, shipping, packaging, customs, tools)

Produce regular financial performance reports

Centralize all expenses (agents, tools, subscriptions, advertising) into one master tracking sheet



Requirements



MANDATORY: Fluent in both English AND French (written and spoken). You will use English daily with Chinese agents and French daily with our internal team. This is a strict requirement.

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills (formulas, pivot tables, automations)

Extremely detail-oriented and rigorous with numbers

Self-starter — you don't wait to be told what to do

E-commerce, dropshipping, sourcing or logistics experience is a big plus

Familiarity with terms like COGS, MOQ, 3PL, fulfillment, gross/net margin



What we offer



A key role in a fast-growing brand

Direct collaboration with the founder

Long-term position — we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us

Remote work

Part-time to start, with potential to evolve into full-time as the business scales



How to apply



Send your CV and a short message explaining why this role is right for you. Please include a few sentences in both English and French so we can assess your level in both languages. If you have an example of a tracking sheet or calculator you have built, attach it — it's a huge plus.

Agriculture and practical tips

title: Thumbnail Designer
description:
They would be **direct-impact thumbnails with instant readability**, built around these key elements:



* ???? **Very high-contrast colors** (red, yellow, black, and white).

* ???? **Huge, bold text**, very few words, clear message (“BREAKING”, “THE END”, etc.).

* ???? **One dominant face in close-up** with a serious or dramatic expression.

* ???? **Arrows or circles** to guide attention to a specific focal point.

* ???? **A secondary contextual image** (military scene, relevant background) to reinforce the topic.

* ???? Designed to be understood on mobile in under 2 seconds.

* ? No unnecessary elements or excessive text.



In short: **one strong face + one powerful scene + 3–6 giant words + aggressive contrast**. Simple, direct, and built for immediate clicks.



2-3 thumbnails per day.

title: HR Manager / Talent Acquisition — Video Editor Recruitment
description:
We are looking for an organized, proactive, and people-oriented HR Manager 

to join our remote team. Your main responsibility will be to build and 

maintain an active portfolio of video editors available on demand, managing 

the full recruitment and subcontracting process independently.



Tasks include:

- Posting and managing job offers on online freelance platforms (Upwork, 

  Fiverr, OnlineJobs.ph, or similar)

- Screening, interviewing, and onboarding video editors

- Building and maintaining an active roster of reliable editors by niche

- Assigning editors to projects based on workload and availability

- Monitoring deliverables, deadlines, and quality standards

- Reporting weekly on team status, active editors, and pipeline



This position requires prior experience with:

- Talent acquisition or HR management in a remote/freelance environment

- Freelance platforms (Upwork, OnlineJobs.ph, or equivalent)

- Basic understanding of video editing workflows and YouTube content

- Managing contractors and subcontractors independently

- Following SOPs and internal guidelines with precision



Terms:

- Pay: $2.50 per hour worked

- Schedule: Part-time (approx. 4 hours/day)

- 100% remote, work at your own pace

This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.

 Ads or Google Ads

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

title: Amazon Graphic Designer - CRO/CTR Focus + AI (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Hi there!



I run a growing e-commerce business where around 90% of revenue and day-to-day operations are Amazon-focused. I also sell on eBay and via our own brand website, but Amazon is the core engine.



I’m hiring a Amazon Graphic / Packaging Designer who wants to work directly with me as the founder in a long-term role and take ownership of our Amazon visual assets that drive CTR and conversion.



If you enjoy clean design, structured workflows, and improving performance through data, please read on.



ABOUT THE BUSINESS

I’m a Dutch founder from Amsterdam and have been building and scaling brands in e-commerce for multiple years. The business is strongly brand-driven and focused on building and defending clear brands in defined niches, not a scattered portfolio of generic products.



Amazon is the main channel (roughly 90%), so the majority of your work will be focused on Amazon listing images and A+ content. We also sell on eBay and via our own brand website, so there will occasionally be supporting design work for those channels too.



My goal as founder is to stay focused on:

- Product and brand development

- Company structure

- Scaling strategy



Your goal is to help me protect that focus by owning our design execution and creative iteration loop.



ABOUT THE ROLE

I’m looking for someone who can consistently create high-quality Amazon visuals and improve them based on performance data.



You will work directly with me and my PPC expert. I will provide context, brand direction, priorities, and product information. You will be responsible for producing assets, keeping files organized, iterating based on feedback and data, and making sure we always have strong creative live on Amazon.



The goal of this role is simple: Create and improve Amazon visuals that increase CTR and conversion, without me having to micromanage the process.



RESPONSIBILITIES

1) Amazon listing images (core responsibility)

- Create and improve main images, secondary images, infographics, and lifestyle images

- Strong focus on clarity, compliance, and scroll-stopping CTR impact

- Ensure consistent branding across all ASINs and variations

- Maintain clean working files and export final assets in the right specs



2) A+ Content and brand assets (Amazon)

- Create A+ content modules

- Create storefront graphics, brand story assets (when needed)

- Work from a structured brief and improve layouts over time



3) Data-driven creative iteration (CRO/CTR focused)

- Use performance data to guide creative decisions (CTR, CVR, session data, conversion changes)

- Propose test ideas (new main image angles, new infographic hierarchy, new hooks)

- Track changes you made and the hypothesis behind them so we can learn over time



4) Occasional packaging and print assets 

- Create or update packaging layouts when needed (labels, boxes, inserts, manuals)

- Ensure print-ready files are correct (dimensions, bleed, dielines if provided, export settings)

- Keep packaging consistent with brand guidelines and compliant with marketplace requirements

- Coordinate with me and suppliers on revisions and final print files



5) AI-assisted image generation workflows 

- Use modern AI tools to support and speed up creative production (Nano Banana and similar tools)

- Create variations efficiently while keeping results realistic, brand-appropriate, and high quality

- Know how to blend AI output with strong manual design judgment (not “AI spam”)



6) Optional: video creation 

- If you have the skill, create full product videos (Amazon listing videos and/or short-form content)

- This is not required, but a strong plus if you can do it well



TOOLS AND WORKFLOW

- Adobe (Photoshop/Illustrator) and/or Figma (depending on your workflow)

- Canva is fine for some assets, but you must be able to produce high-quality, professional outputs

- OneDrive / Google Sheets for asset tracking and briefs

- Notion for SOPs, notes, and documentation

- Microsoft Teams for communication and a weekly sync



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience creating Amazon listing images and A+ content

- Strong eye for layout, hierarchy, and conversion-focused design

- You understand Amazon image compliance and how to balance rules with performance

- You can work from briefs and still think proactively

- You are highly organized (clean files, clean naming, clean versioning)

- Strong written English and clear communication

- Experience with AI image generation tools and workflows is a big plus

- Experience with video editing is a plus (not required)



PERSONALITY FIT

This role fits someone who is:

- Structured and methodical

- Calm and consistent

- Proactive with a strong sense of ownership

- Not a “talker” but a “doer”

- You enjoy building repeatable creative systems and improving assets based on results



HOURS AND ENGAGEMENT

- Part-time: up to 5 hours per week

- Async-friendly and outcome-focused (results matter more than online time)

- Weekly sync with me via Microsoft Teams

- Long-term collaboration preferred

- Some overlap with Europe time is helpful (I’m in the Netherlands)



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH

Hourly paid, $5 to $10 USD per hour, depending on experience and fit. We will start within this range and review performance over time. If you consistently show ownership, reliability, and strong judgment, I’m happy to grow responsibility, hours, and pay over time as the business scales.



GROWTH PATH

This is not a short-term gig. My ideal outcome is to find someone who starts up to 5 hours/week and grows into a bigger role over time. As we grow, you can take ownership of more creative operations and become a key person in the business.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION

When applying, please answer these questions:

1. What does “ownership” mean to you in a design role, and can you give one example of how you showed it in the past?

2. Share 2–3 examples of Amazon listing images or A+ content you created (portfolio links are fine).

3. Which AI tools have you used, and how do you use them in a real workflow?



Cheers,

Friso

title: Shopify Landing Page Specialist
description:
We are looking for a full time landing page specialist to create high converting Shopify landing pages for our ecommerce brand.



Your main job is to build daily landing pages that bridge paid ads to product pages. These pages will usually be advertorials, listicles, and other pre-sell formats designed for unaware and solution aware audiences.



You must understand how to match the landing page angle to the ad creative. Congruency matters a lot. The headline, structure, hook, visuals, and CTA should feel like a natural continuation of the ad, not a disconnected page.



What you’ll do



• Create Shopify landing pages daily

• Turn ad angles into advertorials, listicles, and pre-sell pages

• Match each page to the original ad creative and audience awareness level

• Use product benefits, social proof, reviews, and storytelling to warm up traffic before sending to the product page

• Work fast and iterate with AI tools when useful



What we’re looking for



• Strong experience building landing pages for ecommerce

• Good understanding of Shopify

• Experience with advertorial and listicle style pages

• Strong sense of direct response, conversion, and page flow

• Ability to think through ad to landing page congruency

• Fast executor with good creative judgment

• Comfortable using AI to speed up production



To apply

Start your application with fire horse or we will not review it.



Please include:



• 2 to 5 examples of landing pages you created

• A short explanation of your role in each one

• The tools you use

• Your expected monthly salary

• Your availability

title: Supply Chain Manager (E-commerce | Full Ownership Role)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify dropshipping stores in the US fashion market.



We are looking for a high-level Shopify Supply Chain Manager who can take full ownership of our order flow, supplier communication, and fulfillment operations.



This is a full-time position.

This is NOT a basic VA role.

This is a high-responsibility role where you are expected to take ownership and manage critical parts of the business.



You will be directly responsible for making sure every order is fulfilled correctly, on time, and without issues.



Your Responsibilities



You will manage the full supply chain process from A to Z:



Order & Fulfillment Management

You monitor all Shopify orders daily and ensure no order stays unfulfilled beyond safe timeframes. You track fulfillment progress and identify delays early.



Issue Handling (CRITICAL)

You handle all order issues such as out of stock products, size issues, delays, address problems, RTS orders, and orders stuck in “info received”.

You act fast and prevent issues from turning into refunds or chargebacks.



Supplier Communication

You communicate daily with suppliers, send structured issue lists, and follow up until everything is resolved. You ensure suppliers meet deadlines and expectations.



Refund & Resolution Management

You handle refunds when necessary, but your goal is always to recover value first (store credit, replacements, solutions).

You follow structured processes and keep everything documented.



Inventory & Product Updates

You ensure out-of-stock products are updated correctly and prevent customer confusion on the store.



System & Sheet Management

You work inside structured tracking systems (SCM sheet, refund sheet, supplier tracking).

Accuracy and daily updates are mandatory.



Daily Reporting

At the end of each day, you report what is solved, what is pending, and where risks are.



Who We Are Looking For



You are:

Highly organized

Proactive (you take action without being told)

Detail-oriented

Strong communicator

Solution-driven

Able to work under pressure



You think like an operator and take ownership.



Requirements



Experience with Shopify (REQUIRED)

Experience in e-commerce operations (REQUIRED)

Experience with dropshipping fulfillment (REQUIRED — must be hands-on)

Experience working with suppliers (REQUIRED)

Strong English communication

Ability to follow structured SOPs and systems



Important



This is a full-time role only.

You must be fully available and committed.



You must have real, hands-on experience with dropshipping fulfillment.

We will not consider applicants without this.



We are looking for someone who takes ownership.

Not someone who waits for instructions.

We are building a serious operation and are only looking for people who want to grow long-term.



If you are proactive, structured, and ready to take ownership — apply now.

Compensation:

• Volume may increase depending on quality and consistency



How the Hiring Process Works:

Simple and straightforward.

Before Applying:

Please make sure you can commit to a full-time schedule!



Thanks!

title: Technical SDR/BDR
description:
Who we are

Son of a Coder is a boutique Swedish Tech consultancy based in Stockholm. We design and deliver enterprise Cloud, Data and AI platforms for companies in Banking, FinTech & HealthTech. Our clients are EU enterprises. Our team is senior. Our work is technical and we need someone who can open the right doors.



The opportunity

This is a full-time remote role. You will work directly with our founder & a senior sales team. Your job is to find the right people, start the right conversations and move deals forward. When you get the right person on a call, the technical side is handled. Your job is to make that call happen.

This is a real sales role with a real base salary and real commission. No vague "performance bonuses." No cap on what you can earn.



Commission: 5-6% on closed deals (scales with volume)

- A single signed contract is typically worth $5,000–$20,000 USD

- No earnings cap



What you will do

Prospect outbound via LinkedIn,
, and phone targeting CTOs, IT Directors, and Heads of Engineering across Nordic, European, UK, and US markets

Qualify inbound leads and book discovery calls

Write and send proposals with support from our sales team

Build outreach sequences, scripts, and templates

Manage and maintain your pipeline in our CRM Sailsy.ai similar to HubSpot

Report weekly on activity: meetings booked, calls made, deals progressed



What we are looking for

- At least 5+ years of B2B outbound sales experience — tech, SaaS, or professional services preferred

- Excellent written and spoken English you will represent a Swedish firm to senior European and US executives

- Comfortable with cold outreach; disciplined, self-directed, and consistent

- Familiar with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, CRM tools, and outbound sequencing

- A genuine curiosity about technology. You don't need to code, but you need to hold a smart conversation about Cloud, Data, and AI



Before you apply

We read every application. We skip the ones that don't answer this:

What is one B2B deal you are proud of closing within Tech, SaaS and how did you do it? Two to four sentences is good.



We measure success by meetings booked and deals closed. If you are a hunter who takes pride in your numbers and wants to earn well doing serious, we want to hear from you.

title: Video Editor IA for Ad Creatives — Full-Time ($$$)
description:
About us

We manage several e-commerce brands on the French and European market. Our small, close-knit team works with trust, positive energy and a constant pursuit of excellence. We are growing fast and looking for someone who wants to evolve with us long-term.

Why this role?

We are looking for a full-time creative who can produce high-performing ad content on a daily basis. Not someone who just follows instructions, but someone who thinks, learns fast and is fully invested in their work.

Your missions



Meta and Snapchat ads: short videos from 15 seconds to 1 minute

Organic TikTok content: engaging videos, trends, educational content

Static creatives: product visuals, ad images for Meta feed

AI-generated content: Sora, Veo, Kling, Midjourney, Higgsfield or equivalent

Volume: approximately 30 creatives per week

All content is produced in French — fluency in French is essential to understand the tone, hooks and trends of the French-speaking market

Internal communication and briefs in both English and French



Technical skills required



Minimum 2 years of experience creating content for social media (Meta/Snapchat) and organic content (TikTok)

Strong portfolio showcasing both video AND static creatives

Proficiency with AI tools (Sora, Veo, Kling, Midjourney)

CapCut, Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Canva, Photoshop or Figma for static creatives

MANDATORY: Fluent in both French AND English (written and spoken). All ad content is created in French, and team communication happens in both languages daily. This is non-negotiable.



What we value as much as skills



Genuine motivation and interest in e-commerce and content creation

Fast learning ability

Curiosity — you analyze trends on Meta and TikTok and bring new ideas to the table

Autonomy — you don't like being micromanaged

You are efficient and fast — you meet deadlines, every single time

Punctual and reliable — fixed schedule, no exceptions



Working hours

Monday to Saturday. Fixed schedule to be defined together based on your availability.

What we offer



Long-term position — we don't hire for a single project

Salary that grows with your involvement

Performance bonuses based on the results of your creatives

Profit sharing as the brands grow

Career growth: increased responsibilities, team management



How to apply

Incomplete applications will not be considered:



Portfolio: Meta ads, TikTok videos, static creatives and AI-generated content

In one sentence: what makes the first 2 seconds of a Meta ad effective?

Your main editing software

What AI tools do you use and for what purpose?

Why you and not someone else?

Are you available Monday to Saturday on a fixed schedule?

Please answer questions 2 and 5 in French and the rest in English — so we can assess your level in both languages.

title: Influencer Marketing Coordinator Full Time
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking an organized and driven Influencer Marketing Coordinator to oversee and execute gifting and partnership campaigns with leading fashion and tech companies. This role requires strong experience in influencer marketing, a keen eye for sourcing creators that align with brand identities, and the ability to manage influencer campaigns from start to finish.You will

be working for a marketing agency and working hours are flexible.



You will collaborate closely with a team of 12+ staff members but also thrive working independently, ensuring smooth execution of gifting programs and ambassador partnerships.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Manage influencer gifting programs for multiple fashion and tech clients.

 • Source and identify creators that align with each brand’s values, image, and target audience.

 • Negotiate and coordinate influencer partnerships, including gifting, collaborations, and long-term ambassador agreements.

 • Track, monitor, and report on campaign performance, ensuring deliverables are met.

 • Build and maintain strong relationships with influencers, managers, and brand partners.

 • Collaborate with internal teams to align influencer strategies with broader marketing goals.

 • Organize and maintain campaign calendars, influencer databases, and partnership pipelines.

 • Provide creative input and ideas for improving campaign strategies and influencer activations.

 • Ensure smooth communication and workflows between brands, influencers, and internal tea
mbers.



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in influencer marketing (references required).

 • Background in managing gifting partnerships and influencer activations in fashion and/or tech.

 • Experience in signing and managing influencer ambassadors is a strong plus.

 • Strong organizational and communication skills.

 • Ability to work independently while being an effective team player.

 • Comfortable working across different time zones (flexible), with a full 8-hour dedicated workday.

 • Strong understanding of social media platforms, trends, and creator culture.



Preferred Skills:

 • CRM and influencer management platform experience (Afluencer, Grin, Aspire, etc.).

 • Campaign reporting and analytics experience.

 • Negotiation and contract coordination.

 • Creative mindset with an eye for branding and storytelling.

Virtual Medical Biller Coordinator (Remote)



We are seeking a qualified Virtual Billing Coordinator to join our team. This is a full-time, work-from-home position with an immediate start for the right candidate.



Qualifications and Requirements:

title: Video Editor (Cinema + AI)
description:
We are looking for a skilled video editor who understands cinematic storytelling and is also comfortable using AI tools to improve workflow and creative output.



pay range $1500 - $2000



This role is for someone who knows how to make videos feel polished, intentional, and visually strong — not just cut clips together. We want someone with a good eye for cinema, pacing, emotion, sound design, color, and overall storytelling.

You should also understand how to use AI in video production, whether that means helping with ideation, workflow, cleanup, visual enhancement, or AI-assisted creative tasks. We are looking for someone who knows how to use AI as a tool without losing the human creative side.



What we’re looking for:

- Strong video editing skills

- Understanding of cinematic editing and storytelling

-Good sense of pacing, music, sound design, and emotion

-Experience with color correction / color grading

-Familiarity with AI tools for video, editing, or creative workflow

-Ability to take raw footage and turn it into polished, engaging content

-Strong attention to detail

-Good communication and ability to follow creative direction



Bonus if you have experience with:

-Short-form content

-Long-form storytelling

-Commercial or branded content

-Motion graphics

-AI-generated visuals or AI-assisted video workflows



Important:

To apply, you must send a portfolio of your work.

We want to see examples that show your editing skill, cinematic sense, and creative style.



Please include:

-Portfolio link

-A few of your best projects

-Any work that shows cinematic editing

-Any work where you used AI as part of the process



How to apply:

Send your portfolio, a short introduction about yourself, and any relevant experience.

Some projects require strict adherence to brand guidelines, while others allow more creative flexibility, so the ideal candidate must be comfortable working in both structured and open-ended environments.

Strong motion graphics skills are a plus, but the ability to produce clean, high-volume edits reliably is equally important.

Ability to produce multiple videos per week with consistent quality

title: Eligibility and Benefits Specialist
description:
1. Insurance Verification and Benefit Explanation:

• Clearly convey benefit information to clients, answering their inquiries and addressing concerns.

2. Billing and Claims Management:

• Post insurance payments accurately and in a timely manner into the EHR.

• Follow up on denied claims, appealing and resubmitting as necessary.

• Maintain comprehensive knowledge of coding standards and ensure accurate coding on all claims submitted from the practice.

• Collaborate with providers and staff to resolve billing-related issues and ensure compliance with insurance requirements.

3. Administrative Tasks:

• Work closely with the HR manager to support credentialing efforts for new providers.

• Participate in contract negotiations with the CEO and various insurance panels.

• Collaborate on requesting periodic raises from insurance payors.

• Attend all staff meetings to stay updated on practice-related matters.

4. Communication and Documentation:

• Respond to all
s within a 48-hour timeframe on business days.

• Generate patient statements once a month (1st of each month) to ensure timely billing. (This is now done automatically with our new EHR system.)

5. Integration and Technology:

• Have familiarity with Office Ally clearinghouse and understand its integration with the practice’s EHR system.

• Utilize electronic billing and coding software effectively, ensuring accurate and efficient processing.

Requirements:

• Minimum of 3 years of experience in medical billing and coding, preferably in a mental health or integrative healthcare setting.

• Thorough knowledge of the HCFA form and coding systems.

• Proficiency in using a clearinghouse and other relevant billing software.

• Strong understanding of insurance verification processes and benefit explanation to clients.

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in claims management and documentation.

• Strong organizational and time management skills.

• Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.

• Effective communication skills to interact with insurance companies, providers, and clients.

• Availability to work three days a week, with flexible hours divided as per preference.

Preferred Qualifications:

• Certification in Medical Billing and Coding.

• Familiarity with IntakeQ system and their integration with Office Ally.

• Prior experience with insurance negotiations and contact management.

• Knowledge of credentialing processes for healthcare providers.



Note: This job description is intended to outline the general responsibilities and qualifications for the Eligibility and Benefits Specialist position. It is not an exhaustive list of all duties and expectations. The responsibilities and requirements may evolve as the practice grows and additional providers are hired.

title: Sales representative
description:
Sales Representative Test Task – MKB Media Solutions

Welcome,

This test is designed to assess your ability to initiate conversations and generate leads for MKB Media Solutions.

As a Sales Representative, your role will be to connect with potential clients and open the door for new business opportunities through effective outreach.

The Goal

At MKB Media Solutions, we help businesses improve their online presence and attract more customers through media mentions.

Your responsibility will be to reach out to potential clients, start meaningful conversations, and create interest in our services.

The Test

Instructions:

Please complete the following two tasks. Keep your responses clear, concise, and natural. We are looking for messages that feel human and effective, not overly scripted.

Cold Outreach (DM)

Write a short cold DM to a business owner (e-commerce brand) introducing our services.

Your goal is to start a conversation, not a hard pitch, personalize the message, and spark curiosity and interest.

Warm Outreach (Referral Message)

Write a message you would send to a friend, acquaintance, or connection asking for referrals.

Your goal is to keep it low-pressure, make it easy for them to help, and sound natural and genuine.

Evaluation Criteria

Your responses will be evaluated based on relevance, clarity, effectiveness, tone and style, and creativity.

We are looking for messages that fit the situation, are easy to understand, and would realistically get a response. Your tone should feel human, confident, and professional while still standing out.

Additional Information

You may use AI tools, but your final answers should feel authentic and personal. Keep responses short and to the point, and focus on real-world effectiveness.

Deadline

April 14, 2026.

Submission

Please submit your responses to both tasks along with your CV.



Good Luck!!

title: Spiritual Content VA
description:
Repurpose 200+ hours of audio into short videos & manage sales funnel



Must have:



- Experience with Notebook LM (or similar AI repurposing tool) to turn long audio into 60?second clips with hooks.



- Manual video editing (e.g., CapCut, Descript, Adobe Premiere Rush, or TikTok’s built?in editor). You will receive timestamps from Notebook LM; you must cut the original audio/video accordingly.



- Ability to add simple text overlays (CTA) and export as 60?second MP4 for TikTok and YouTube Shorts.



- Ability to post daily on TikTok and YouTube Shorts (scheduling tools like Later or Buffer are fine).



- Familiarity with Google Drive (shared folders, organised file management).



- Basic HubSpot (free version) – can create landing pages and simple
 sequences.



- English fluency, reliable communicator, interested in personal development / spirituality.



Note: Notebook LM will generate the timestamps and hooks. You will do the actual cutting and posting. No advanced editing skills needed – just basic trimming and overlay text.



Optional but nice: experience with Gumroad, Canva (for simple captions/overlays), and community management (WhatsApp/Telegram group).



Compensation: Hourly for first month (setup). Thereafter, base hourly + A$19 commission per Personal Alchemy sale (A$111 product). This incentivises quality repurposing – more views = more sales.



To apply: Send a short Loom video showing one example of repurposed content (any niche) + your understanding of the funnel: free PDF ? $2.99 trial ? $47/month ? $111.



You don’t need to build the funnel – just follow the existing plan: post clips with the CTA, ensure the link works, and track basic metrics (views, clicks).

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

This role involves designing scalable workflows, writing custom Deluge code, and implementing API-based integrations to streamline business processes.



About Us:

title: Intermediate Level WordPress Developer
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a WordPress Developer with experience in user-centered design, AI-assisted development, CRM integration, workflow automation, and WooCommerce.

We already have a working WordPress website, a live WooCommerce store, and some existing CRM integrations in place. This is not a build-from-scratch role. We need someone who can step in, understand what we have, and take it further — improving the user experience, expanding CRM and automation capabilities, and maintaining what is already running.

Web Design and User Experience

Ensure responsive, mobile-first performance across devices and browsers

WooCommerce (Existing Store)
