title: Google Ads Manager - eCommerce $1800-$2200/month
description:
Google Ads Manager -  $1,800 - $2,200 USD/Month + Bonus 

Remote Full-Time  Philippines



ABOUT US

We are the Golden Horde, an e-commerce company with 2 brands generating $10M+ in yearly

revenue. Our Google Ads account has been running for 5+ years - we're not starting from

scratch, we're scaling what already works, and we need someone who can own that.



THE ROLE

You'll take full strategic ownership of our Google Ads account - currently spending

$40,000/month - across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube. You work directly

with the CEO and brief our internal creative team on assets needed to win. In 90 days, we

expect improved ROAS, a clean account structure, and a scaling roadmap you own.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Account Strategy & Execution

Audit, own, and continuously optimize our existing 5-year Google Ads account

Launch and manage campaigns across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and

YouTube

Scale ad spend profitably - your job is not just to maintain, it's to grow

Manage daily budgets responsibly with a clear view of ROAS at all times



Data & Attribution

Use WeTracked and Triple Whale to make attribution-led decisions - not gut feel

Analyze performance data weekly and translate findings into clear actions

Identify what's working, what's wasting spend, and act on it fast



Creative & Team Collaboration

Brief our internal creative team on ad assets - hooks, formats, seasonal creative

Plan ahead for seasonal campaigns (holidays, peak periods) - briefs go out before the

deadline, not during it

Communicate performance data to the creative team in plain language they can act on



Reporting & Communication

Send weekly performance updates to the CEO - proactively, without being asked

Flag issues, budget concerns, or opportunities before they become problems



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Solid years of experience managing Google Ads accounts spending $30K–$100K+/month and can show the results — not just the account access

You have direct DTC e-commerce experience — lead gen backgrounds will not be considered

Experience in using WeTracked, Triple Whale, Northbeam, or Hyros — you understand attribution beyond native Google data

You know Google Shopping, Performance Max, Search, and YouTube — not just one of them

You send updates before being asked. You flag problems before they escalate. That's

how you operate.

You think like a business owner, not a platform operator — ROAS matters more to you

than impressions

Strong English communication — you'll be briefing a creative team and reporting directly

to the CEO



If you've scaled a Google Ads account past 5 figures in monthly spend and have the numbers to

prove it, apply now. Compensation includes a base of $1,800–$2,200/month plus bonus - for

the right person, this role pays more.



How to Apply? Kindly fill out the application form: 
 or
 your Updated CV to 
 with a subject line: Google Ads Manager - [Total years of experience as a Google Ads Manager in Ecommerce]



Important Note: We don't hire for potential, we hire for what they can already do.

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist & Static Ad Creator (Facebook Ad Library Expert)
description:
We are a growing business based in the UK looking for a talented Meta Ads Creative Strategist who can create high-converting static ads while also digging deep into competitors' campaigns.

Your main role will be to:



Regularly monitor and analyze our competitors' ads in the
/Meta Ad Library.

Reverse-engineer what’s working: identify strong hooks, emotional triggers, colour psychology, layouts, social proof, urgency/scarcity elements, and overall psychology behind high-performing static ads.

Turn those insights into clear, detailed creative briefs and directions that we (or other designers) can use to produce winning ads.

Create static ads yourself (using tools like Canva, Photoshop, or similar) — including variations for testing (A/B testing angles, headlines, visuals, etc.).

Stay on top of Meta ads trends and suggest new creative ideas based on data and competitor research.



Key Responsibilities:



Daily/weekly competitive analysis via
 Ad Library.

Break down successful (and failing) competitor static ads — explain the psychology and why they convert (or don’t).

Produce 5–15 static ad variations per week (or as needed for testing).

Write clear creative briefs with hooks, messaging angles, visual direction, and testing hypotheses.

Work closely with our team to iterate based on ad performance (CTR, conversions, ROAS feedback).



What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience with Meta/Facebook ads creative (especially static image ads).

Strong ability to analyze
 Ad Library and turn insights into actionable strategies.

Good understanding of advertising psychology, direct-response marketing, and what makes people stop scrolling and click/buy.

Excellent English communication (written) — you need to explain your thinking clearly in briefs.

Proficiency in design tools (Canva, Photoshop, Figma, etc.) for creating clean, professional static ads.

Bonus: Experience in e-commerce, D2C, or performance marketing.



Requirements:



At least 1–2 years of hands-on experience creating or strategizing Meta ads.

Portfolio or examples of past ad creatives + any competitor analysis/briefs you’ve done (please share links or screenshots when applying).

Reliable internet and availability for UK business hours overlap when needed (we’re flexible).

Long-term commitment preferred (this is not a one-off project).



What We Offer:



Long-term, stable remote work.

Competitive hourly rate (depending on experience and quality — we increase for proven results).

Opportunity to directly impact our ad performance and scaling.

Clear feedback and collaboration with a UK-based team.



If you love spying on ads in the Ad Library, understanding why certain creatives crush it, and turning that into scroll-stopping static ads + smart briefs — this role is for you.

How to Apply:

Please send:



Your updated resume/portfolio.

2–3 examples of static ads you’ve created (or briefs you’ve written).

A short message explaining why you’re a good fit and any experience with competitor Ad Library analysis.



We review applications quickly and will reply only to strong matches.

title: Executive & Multimedia VA
description:
We are looking for our next Executive & Multimedia VA

Full-Time | Remote | 6-Month Contract (Potential to Extend)



Application Requirements:

To apply, please submit the following:



A link to your updated resume (PDF format only).



A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) made specifically for this job post. Tell us about your experience in content creation, why you thrive working autonomously, and why you’re the right fit for this high-level role.



A portfolio or links to internal documents, SOPs, or multimedia content (videos/graphics) you have designed.



A brief cover letter that includes your expected salary.



Note: Generic or pre-recorded videos will not be accepted. Incomplete applications will NOT be considered.



The Role:

We are a busy, Australian-based window blinds manufacturing company seeking a high-level Executive Virtual Assistant to support our Directors. This isn't just an admin role; we need a creative "right hand" who can take a concept and run with it. If you have a sharp eye for design, a talent for creating professional internal content, and the ability to work with zero hand-holding, we want to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Multimedia Content Creation: Designing and producing high-quality internal documents, training resources, and visual assets that "look the part."



Executive Support: Managing traditional VA tasks for two busy directors with efficiency and discretion.



Research & Initiative: Sourcing tools, information, or assets independently. You are expected to find solutions before asking for guidance.



Documentation: Building and refining SOPs and internal guides to a professional, boardroom-ready standard.



Outcome Management: Taking full ownership of projects from brief to completion, ensuring high-quality delivery every time.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Exceptional Autonomy: You are a self-starter who knows "what looks good" and can deliver polished work without constant feedback loops.



Multimedia Savvy: Strong skills in tools like Canva, Adobe Suite, or similar video/graphic software.



Advanced Communication: Impeccable written and verbal English—able to communicate clearly with Australian leadership.



Attention to Detail: You have high standards for your own work and rarely need a second set of eyes to catch mistakes.



Proactive Mindset: You don't just wait for instructions; you anticipate needs and research the "how-to" yourself.



Experience: Proven track record in executive assistance and creative content/document production.



If you’re a professional who takes pride in high-level execution and wants to join a supportive, fast-paced international team, we’d love to see what you can do!

You must have built at least 2–3 similar multi-source automation projects before. Please reply with links or screenshots of your past 
 real estate or lead systems. I’m looking for someone who can work fast and clean. Rate is $3–5/hr depending on experience.



Must be willing to focus on one project and not job stack with other clients. When you are working for us you must stay focused on what we are building.

title: Senior Salesforce Developer & IT Generalist — Ongoing Part-Time Contract
description:
Remote | Part-Time | Long-Term Engagement



We are a fast-growing Australian direct-to-consumer retailer with an expanding sales team. Salesforce Sales Cloud is the engine of our sales operation, and we need an expert to help us get the most out of it — and out of our broader tech stack.



This is a strategic, hands-on role. You will be our internal Salesforce lead and IT sounding board — building CRM infrastructure that drives sales performance, surfacing insights for marketing, and using tools like Claude Code to build solutions across the business. Critically, you will also be a regular presence in team conversations — working directly with our Director, Sales Manager, Operations Manager, and CX Manager to understand what each team needs and deliver accordingly.





Primary focus — Salesforce Sales Cloud

- Build and maintain a robust lead management system — inbound capture, routing, and scoring

- Design lead scoring models based on source, behaviour, and engagement signals

- Track and report on close rates, conversion rates, and pipeline velocity by rep and by channel

- Build pipeline valuation reporting to give marketing visibility into lead quality and revenue contribution

- Develop real-time dashboards for sales leadership across the full funnel

- Automate follow-up workflows, stage progressions, task creation, and rep activity tracking

- Manage integrations with Shopify, Klaviyo, and telephony tools — data must flow cleanly into Salesforce

- Own CRM data integrity — deduplication, field standardisation, and ongoing hygiene



Stakeholder communication & team collaboration

- Attend regular team calls with the Director, Sales Manager, Operations Manager, and CX Manager

- Translate each team's operational needs into technical requirements and deliver against them

- Provide clear, jargon-free updates on what you are building, what is live, and what is coming next

- Proactively surface recommendations — you should be bringing ideas to us, not just waiting for a brief



Broader IT & tooling

- Act as our IT sounding board — advising on app stack, access management, and system architecture

- Use Claude Code to build internal tools across sales, finance, operations, and customer service

- Identify and implement automation opportunities across business functions beyond Salesforce



What we are looking for

- 5+ years of Salesforce development experience with deep Sales Cloud expertise

- Demonstrated experience building lead scoring, pipeline reporting, and sales performance dashboards

- Strong Apex, LWC, Flow Builder, and SOQL skills

- Comfortable across third-party integrations via REST APIs and middleware

- Excellent spoken and written English — you can hold a business conversation at any level of the organisation

- Broad IT competency — you can think beyond Salesforce and advise on systems holistically

- Self-directed and proactive — you take ownership and do not need to be micromanaged

- Salesforce certifications preferred — Administrator, Platform Developer I or II, Sales Cloud Consultant



Tooling & environment

We are an AI-native business. We provide full Claude Code access to accelerate development across all projects. We value developers who embrace modern tooling, move fast, and bring initiative. Curiosity and adaptability matter as much as technical depth.



To apply, please complete the application form here:





Note: If you are unable to click the application link due to the OnlineJobs.ph interface, please copy the link and paste it directly into your browser.

title: Bookkeeper/Accountant
description:
## **Virtual Bookkeeper / Accountant (Full-Time or Part-Time) – Remote (Philippines Only)**



We are a growing U.S.-based company seeking a **reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Bookkeeper/Accountant** to manage our day-to-day financials and keep our books clean and accurate.



This is a long-term position for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and understands U.S. accounting standards.



---



### **Responsibilities**



* Maintain accurate financial records in **QuickBooks Online** 

Create invoices and maintain Spreadsheets information

* Categorize transactions and reconcile bank/credit card accounts

* Manage Accounts Payable & Accounts Receivable

* Prepare monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

* Clean up and organize books when needed

* Assist with budgeting and basic financial analysis

* Ensure books are always audit-ready

* Communicate weekly updates on financial status



---



### **Requirements (DO NOT APPLY if you don’t meet these)**



* Minimum **3+ years bookkeeping/accounting experience**

* Strong experience with **QuickBooks Online (REQUIRED)**

* Experience working with **U.S.-based companies**

* Solid understanding of:



  * Chart of Accounts

  * Reconciliation

  * Financial statements

* High attention to detail (no sloppy work)

* Strong English communication (written & verbal)

* Reliable internet and ability to work consistently



---



### **Preferred (Big Plus)**



* Experience with **multiple businesses or clients**

* Experience with **cleanup/catch-up bookkeeping**

* Knowledge of **U.S. tax basics**

* Experience with tools like **Gusto, Stripe, or payroll systems**



---



### **Compensation**



* Based on experience (competitive for Philippines market)

* Performance-based raises over time

* Long-term opportunity with consistent work



---



### **How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Filter Step)**



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



1. Start your application with: **“I am your next bookkeeper because…”**

2. Include:



   * Years of experience

   * QuickBooks experience (what exactly you’ve done)

   * Example of a business you’ve handled (brief)

3. Record a **2-minute Loom video** explaining:



   * Your experience

   * How you ensure accuracy in bookkeeping

4. Please let us know the day you could start? Also include your Whats app number so we can schedule an interview.

5. Please Send a 30 Second Video of yourself telling us why you would be good for our company?



Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be considered.



---



### **What We’re Looking For**



We want someone who:



* Takes ownership (not just task completion)

* Catches mistakes before we do

* Keeps things organized without being asked

* Thinks like a business owner, not just a worker



---



If you’re dependable, detail-oriented, and want a long-term role with a growing company — we want to hear from you.



---

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Virtual Marketing Coordinator
description:
The nLIVEn Team is an Australian based business executive coaching and management consulting business on a mission to help individuals, teams and organisations unlock their full potential. We work with ambitious people who want real, lasting change — and our marketing needs to reflect that energy.



We're looking for a Part-time Marketing Coordinator with a passion for growing a boutique professional service firm style businesses to join us and help bring more of the right clients into our world.



What you'll do - things like:



- Run our content calendar across LinkedIn, Instagram, and

- Write copy that sounds like us — real, energetic, and value-packed

- Grow and nurture our
 list with campaigns that convert

- Track what's working and double down on it

- Help promote events, webinars, and new offers



You're a great fit if you…



- Have 5+ years in marketing or content — coaching/consulting experience is a big plus

- In your late 20s to early 30s and looking for a great, secure place to settle into the next stage of your career

- Write with personality and can adapt to a brand voice quickly

- Take ownership and don't need hand-holding

- Get excited by watching numbers move in the right direction

- Want to be part of something that genuinely helps people



What we offer:



- Flexible part-time hours — work when it suits you (e.g. 5 hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break)

- A collaborative, high-energy team that's growing fast

- Real ownership of your work — your impact is visible

- Opportunity to grow with the business

- A coaching culture that values personal and professional learning, growth and development 



How to apply: 



- Send us a short intro (3–5 sentences on why you're the one), a link to any work samples or your LinkedIn, and your answer to this question: "What's one underrated marketing tactic that boutique coaching and consulting businesses should be using?"

- Applications without the question answered will not be considered — we want to see how you listen, think and speak (in writing)



The role could grow to full-time position in the future, or we can add other virtual tea
mbers if you prefer to stay part-time.

This role requires excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, and capable of working both independently and as part of a team.

Base remuneration advertised as US$6/hour x 15 hours/week x 4.33 weeks per month = US$389.97 to US$6/hour x 20 hours/week x 4.33 weeks per month = US$519.96.

title: Sales Representative For Digital Creator
description:
We are a digital media management company that helps online creators maximize their revenue through direct messaging and fan engagement. We are looking for dedicated, emotionally intelligent Sales Representatives to join our team on an ongoing basis.

This is NOT a "reply to messages" job. This is a relationship-building, sales-driven role where you will be the voice behind a creator's brand — connecting with fans, building genuine rapport, and driving revenue through conversations. If you're a people person with sharp instincts and a hunger to earn, keep reading.

What You'll Be Doing



Representing a creator's voice and personality through direct messages with subscribers on a creator platform

Building genuine relationships with fans to increase loyalty, retention, and long-term value

Selling premium content through natural, emotionally intelligent conversation — not spamming

Following scripts and sales frameworks while adapting creatively to each fan's personality

Tracking and reporting your shift performance (messages sent, response time, revenue generated)



What We're Looking For

Must-Haves:



Excellent written English — near-native fluency required (you'll be representing a Western creator, so vocabulary, slang, tone, and nuance all matter)

Fast typing speed (60+ WPM preferred)

Reliable internet connection and a proper desktop or laptop setup (no phones, no tablets)

Available to commit to consistent 8-hour shifts (multiple shifts available — morning, day, and night)

Familiarity with CRM tools such as Infloww or Supercreator is a strong plus — if you know what these are, mention it in your application

Sales-oriented mindset — you don't just answer questions, you guide conversations toward a goal

Self-disciplined and organized — you show up on time, follow systems, and take ownership of your work



What separates good from great:



Background or genuine interest in psychology, sales, or relationship-building

Creative problem solver — if a fan wants something you can't offer, you find a way to redirect and still deliver value

Hungry to grow — you're not just looking for a paycheck, you want to develop a real skill and earn more over time

You welcome feedback, take notes, and improve daily



Compensation



Base pay: $3–$5/hour depending on experience and performance

Commission on sales you generate. Our creators generate significant monthly revenue. Top-performing tea
mbers who consistently drive sales and build strong fan relationships earn well beyond base pay. How much you earn is directly tied to how good you are.

Structured onboarding with training and supervised practice before you go live

Clear growth path — high performers get access to higher-traffic accounts and better commission structures



Shift Availability

We need coverage across the following windows (all times US Eastern / EST):



Morning Shift: 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Day Shift: 2:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

Night Shift: 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM EST



Please indicate in your application which shift(s) you are available for.



How to Apply

Read carefully — applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Click "Apply for this Job" and write your application message. Do NOT send a generic copy-paste message. Tell us briefly why you're a good fit for this role.

In your application message, include the following:



Your name and age

Which shift(s) you are available for (Morning, Day, and/or Night)

Your typing speed in WPM (test for free at 
 and include your result)

Your English proficiency level (fluent, advanced, or intermediate)

Any relevant work experience — especially if you have used tools like Infloww or Supercreator

A short answer to this question: "A long-time paying subscriber messages you saying he's been feeling ignored lately and is thinking about cancelling. What do you say to him?" (There is no single "right" answer — we want to see how you think.)





At the very bottom of your application message, include the exact phrase: "I have read and understood the full job description."



We are looking for effort and thoughtfulness, not one-word answers. Applicants who clearly put thought into their responses will be contacted with next steps.

Strong candidates will be kept in our pipeline for future openings even if no position is immediately available.

title: Growth Content Operator (Short-Form Video Editor + Ads Assistant)
description:
Title: Growth Content Operator (Short-Form Video Editor + Ads Assistant)



About Us:

We are building a fast-growing brand and launching paid social media campaigns. We already have content, strategy, and systems (Notion OS, creative direction, mood boards) in place.



Now we need someone who can help us execute fast, improve content performance, and support our ad campaigns.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a Growth Content Operator, someone who can turn raw content into high-performing short-form videos and help us test and improve ads.



This is NOT a basic VA role. You will play a key role in helping us grow from $0 to $10k/month.



Your Responsibilities:



* Edit short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, paid ads)

* Improve weak videos (hooks, pacing, captions, engagement)

* Create multiple variations of each video (especially different hooks)

* Turn long-form or raw footage into short-form content

* Follow our Notion system to manage content and tasks

* Assist with launching ads in Meta Ads Manager

* Duplicate and test creatives inside campaigns

* Help us increase content output and improve performance over time



What Success Looks Like:



* 20–30 high-quality short-form videos per week

* Clear improvement in hooks, pacing, and engagement

* Faster content production and iteration

* Organized execution inside our systems



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong experience editing short-form content (TikTok/Reels/UGC ads)

* Deep understanding of hooks (first 1–3 seconds are critical)

* Ability to improve content — not just edit it

* Fast turnaround and strong attention to detail

* Comfortable following systems and executing consistently

* Basic familiarity with Meta Ads Manager (or willingness to learn quickly)



Bonus (Not Required):



* Experience with direct response ads

* Understanding of metrics like CTR, CPA, ROAS

* Experience working with growing brands or startups



Compensation:

$700–$1,200/month (depending on experience and skill level)

Opportunity to grow with the company as we scale



How to Apply:

Please include:



1. Portfolio of short-form videos (TikTok/Reels/ads)

2. 2–3 examples of videos you’ve edited that performed well

3. A short explanation of what makes a good hook

4. The word “Growth” at the top of your application



Important:

We will provide a paid test task before hiring.

title: Social Media and Content Manager
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

The ideal candidate is a detail-oriented, creative and dependable team player with experience working as a part of a high performing team and someone with a strong background in social media and content strategy.

You have a proven track record of planning, creating and executing engaging content in the online education and high-ticket service space (i.e. Coaches, agencies, advisors). Leading to increased visibility, higher engagement and creating content that convert followers into leads. 



In addition to consistent content output, it is expected that you’ll display a high level of proactiveness towards improving the management and sharing of content, maximizing the use of current tools or materials of the organization in a smart way and working closely with the Founder as a key part of the team. 



***Key Responsibilities

Content management:

- Create content that aligns with current trends and industry best practices, while managing content calendars to ensure posts go out consistently and on time.

- Collaborate with the leadership team to ensure content reflects key brand messages and marketing goals.

- Set up and manage tools like website domains, business
s, text messaging, and Google profiles, and keep marketing automations and workflows running smoothly.



Video editing:

- Apply video edits such as cuts/transitions, audio overlays, cinematic inserts and other edits that align with the brand and content goals.

- Create engaging short-form reels for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok

- Assist in editing long form videos for podcast interviews and youtube. 

- Create eye catching thumbnails

- Audience Management and prospecting:

- Send connection requests, monitor, respond to, send and engage with comments, messages, and mentions on social media platforms to build meaningful connections and foster a positive brand image.

- Ensure the contact database is regularly updated and accurately organized, while segmenting
 lists to enable targeted and effective communication



CRM Workflows

- Efficiently manage client relationships through customized CRM workflows

Tracking leads in real time, automating follow-ups, and syncing seamlessly with your favorite tools.

- Monitor KPIs in real time to refine strategies and ensure every campaign, workflow, and funnel delivers measurable ROI.



Tracking and reporting:

- Generate regular reports and provide analytics on content,
, and campaign performance.

- Monitoring and reporting on paid media performance by tracking metrics such as CPM, CPL, leads generated, and CPA.

- Overseeing and monitoring pipeline and opportunities, ensuring that leads are effectively tracked, followed up on, and moved through the stages



RESULTS (KPIs)

- 100% on time publication of content according to content calendar

- Minimize response time towards audience engagements and inquiries

- Increase overall social media engagement, audience growth and lead generation

- Consistent and accurate reporting of content and marketing performance metrics



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Proficient in using video editing tools like Capcut, Descript, Davinci Resolve

- Ability to edit graphics using tools like Canva and Photoshop

- Proficient in using CRMs like Active Campaign, GoHighLevel and Clickfunnels

- Experience in Google Workspace (Gmail, GDrive, Docs, Sheets)

- Experience in Microsoft Office Workspace

- Understand the algorithm of different social media platforms

- Prior experience managing social media and content of personality-driven businesses



WORK SCHEDULE:

- Full time position. 8 hours per day. Monday to Friday.

- Exact shift times will be based on the job role.

- Depending on the demand, you may be required to work during any of these timezones: All North American time zones, European time zones, Australia/Asia Pacific time zones.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE AND PERKS:

- Hourly rate starting from 4 USD / hour

- Eligibility for quarterly bonuses upon hitting performance KPIs. Up to 800USD

- Pay rise potential according to experience and performance

- Opportunity to be hired for projects at higher one-off fees on top of standard salary

- Work from home privilege

- Opportunity to work with a high-performing team



***HOW TO APPLY:

If you meet all the above requirements and are confident that you are a great fit for this position, submit your application by clicking on the following link:

???? 
/to/z3OTqcwU

???? We also prefer you to like Pink Elephants 



Please do NOT private message us regarding this job. We have a hiring process in place and will only accept applicants who can follow the process.



Place the word "I am" at the start of your full name in the application form.

title: Digital Marketing & Campaign Lead
description:
We are a long-standing Singapore home appliance brand looking for a proactive Digital Marketing & Campaign Lead to drive brand growth and support online sales through strong planning, coordination, and execution.



This is primarily a planning and coordination role, not a content creation or video editing role. You will take ownership of our social media calendar, EDM planning,
 channel, campaign launches, KOL outreach, and cross-department coordination, while working closely with our in-house design team and other stakeholders to ensure campaigns and marketing initiatives are delivered well and on time.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the brand’s social media calendar across relevant platforms

Plan EDM strategy, campaign flow, and monthly/weekly sends

Manage and grow our
 channel

Propose fresh marketing ideas and new initiatives to improve GMV and brand image

Plan and coordinate product launch campaigns and ad hoc marketing pushes

Drive KOL, creator, and brand partnership outreach and planning

Plan and execute giveaway and community engagement campaigns

Work closely with our in-house designers to brief, review, and deliver campaign assets on time

Coordinate across departments to ensure smooth execution of campaigns and promotions

Track timelines, follow up on deliverables, and keep projects moving

Plan sales mechanics and promotional setups across channels

Create and launch new product listings where needed

Relay orders and POs clearly to the warehouse team for fulfilment coordination

Support TikTok livestream setup and planning



What We’re Looking For

Strong written and spoken English

Strong planning and project coordination skills

Good sense of branding, marketing, and visual direction

Experience in digital marketing, campaign planning, and EDM management

Comfortable working across departments and following up with different stakeholders

Able to take ownership and push projects forward independently

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

Comfortable working remotely with a Singapore team



Nice to Have

Experience with Klaviyo, Shopify, TikTok Shop, or similar tools

Experience with KOL or influencer outreach

Experience with
/community management

Experience with livestream planning

Content Creation Ability



Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who can act like a mini owner for the function — someone who can plan, push, coordinate, and execute, while keeping brand standards and commercial goals in mind.

title: Mechanical estimator
description: We are a mechanical installation / pipe fitting company who work in the commercial sector installing energy centres, plantrooms, toilet blocks, domestic water services , gas pipework. title: Fan Community Manager – Leroy Sanchez (Social Media & Fandom Activation)
description:
We are looking for a Fan Community Manager who is already familiar with Leroy Sanchez and his music to help grow and activate his global fan community online.



Leroy has a passionate fanbase around the world, and we are looking for someone who understands that fan engagement is built through community, interaction, and creativity — not just posting content.



This role focuses on activating fans, encouraging participation, and helping fan content spread organically across social media platforms.





Responsibilities



• Engage with Leroy Sanchez fan communities across social media (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube, etc.)

• Identify and connect with active fan accounts and fan community leaders

• Encourage fan-generated content (edits, covers, reactions, etc.)

• Help organize fan activities such as listening parties, hashtag campaigns, and online fan events

• Monitor trends and conversations within Leroy’s fandom

• Support the growth of organic engagement around new releases and content

• Share insights about fan behavior and trending content





Requirements



• Must already be familiar with Leroy Sanchez and his music

• Active on social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube)

• Strong understanding of how online fan communities work

• Fluent in English and with a plus if speaking Spanish too. Not fully required. 

• Passionate about music and digital culture

• Organized, proactive, and creative





Bonus if you:



• Have previously managed or participated in fan communities

• Have experience running fan accounts or community pages

• Understand music release cycles and online fan engagement





Position Details



• Remote position

• Part-time

• Flexible schedule

• Long-term opportunity with potential to grow





What We’re Looking For



Someone who:



• Truly understands Leroy’s audience

• Knows how to activate fans organically

• Enjoys interacting with communities online

• Can help turn listeners into engaged fans





To Apply



Please include:

1) Why you are a fan of Leroy Sanchez

2) Your experience with social media or fan communities. K-Pop fan community management is a plus. 

3) Links to any accounts or communities you manage



Thank you!

Remote (Work-from-home)

title: Order Issue Manager (Fashion E-commerce / Dropshipping)
description:
We are a fast-growing fashion e-commerce brand looking for a highly detail-oriented Order Issue Manager to take full ownership of order tracking, missing items, and fulfillment coordination.



This role is critical to our operations, and we are only looking for someone with proven experience in fashion dropshipping with a high SKU count.



???? IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING



ONLY apply if:



- You have worked directly with a fashion dropshipping store

- You have managed orders with many SKUs (variants, sizes, colors)

- You have handled order issues / missing items / fulfillment problems

- You can provide real store examples (websites) you worked for



Applications without this will be ignored.



???? Your Role



You will be responsible for ensuring that every order is fulfilled correctly and on time, by identifying and resolving issues before they become problems.



???? Daily Responsibilities



- Check unfulfilled orders daily in Shopify

- Identify missing products, variants, or stock issues

- Coordinate with suppliers to:

- Confirm availability

- Order missing items immediately

- Communicate with the customer service team to:

- Update customers about delays or missing items

- Provide clear timelines and solutions

- Track and follow up on all problematic orders until resolution



Maintain a clean internal system (Google Sheets) to track issues

Flag recurring issues (supplier problems, SKU issues, etc.)

title: Technical Virtual Assistant
description:
Technical Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: Php23,000.00 - Php29,000.00 per month

Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.



How to Apply:

Read the full job description and complete our application form:

Application Form: 



______________________________________________________________________



Company: Letsreach (
)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: Php23,000-29,000

Hours: Full-time (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Start Date: Immediate



About the Role:

Letsreach is a fast-growing influencer marketing agency working with gaming, tech, and entertainment creators. We're looking for a technically capable Virtual Assistant who can run and learn automation workflows, manage complex data systems, and execute campaigns with precision.



This role is built around:

1. Automation platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier) - running workflows and learning our systems

2. Google Sheets - advanced database management with formulas and data validation

3. Instantly.ai -
 campaign management across multiple domains

4. Project management systems - Notion for documentation, Slack for communication

5. Client communication and coordination - account management for different clients

6. AI tools - Claude and Perplexity for research and creator discovery



This is for someone who:

- Has worked with automation tools before (Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar)

- Is comfortable learning complex workflows and technical interfaces

- Is detail-oriented and catches errors before they become problems

- Can work independently with documentation and SOPs



What You'll Do

- Run automation workflows - Execute n8n/Make workflows for creator discovery and data processing

- Manage complex databases - Maintain creator and brand databases in Google Sheets with advanced formulas

- Handle
 campaigns - Manage Instantly.ai platform across multiple domains and campaigns

- Execute technical tasks - Troubleshoot workflow errors, validate data accuracy, organize systems

- Research using AI tools - Use Claude and Perplexity for creator research and analysis

- Maintain operations - Keep files organized, update documentation, communicate progress via Slack



Requirements



Must Have:

- 4-5 years professional work experience

- Experience with automation tools (Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms) - even basic workflows count

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF statements, pivot tables, data validation, complex formulas)

- Detail-oriented - high accuracy in data entry and technical tasks

- Comfortable with technical complexity - won't be intimidated by workflows with multiple steps

- Excellent written English for professional communication

- Independent problem-solver - troubleshoots first, asks specific questions when stuck

- Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power solution



Preferred:

- Familiar with influencer marketing or creator economy

- Used Claude, Perplexity, or similar AI research tools

- Experience with
 campaign platforms

- Remote work background



NOT a fit if you:

- Need constant guidance or hand-holding

- Get overwhelmed by technical interfaces

- Haven't worked with any automation tools before



What We Offer:

Compensation: $400-$500/month based on experience and technical proficiency



Growth Opportunity:

- Advanced automation platforms (n8n is highly valuable skill)

- Work with AI tools (Claude, Perplexity) for real business applications

- Exposure to influencer marketing with major gaming/tech creators

- Direct collaboration with founders - small team, big impact

- Build technical skills that significantly increase your market value



Work Environment:

- Independent work with clear documentation

- Flexible hours with some Dubai timezone (UTC+4) overlap

- Results-focused, not micromanaged

- Tools and systems for productive remote work



How to Apply:

Read the full job description and complete our application form:

? Application Form: 



Timeline: We review applications weekly. Shortlisted candidates receive a practical assessment, then video interview with founders.



Important:

* Automation experience required - even if basic, you must have worked with Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar

* We assess technical skills through practical tests for shortlisted candidates

* Documentation and SOPs provided, but you must learn independently

* This is technical operations work, not basic administrative support



Job Type: Full-time?Pay: Php23,000.00 - Php29,000.00 per month

Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.

title: Video Editor
description:
???? Creative Video Editor Wanted for Civilization Documentary YouTube Channel



About the Project

We produce YouTube videos that explore the origin and progress of civilization—covering human history, ancient cultures, technology, religion, and the rise of nations.

We already have scripts, narration, and video concepts ready. Now, we’re looking for a talented video editor who can bring these ideas to life through cinematic visuals, smooth storytelling, and engaging animations.

If you love history, documentaries, and creative storytelling through video — this is the perfect role for you.



???? Job Description

We’re looking for a video editor and motion graphics specialist to transform raw ideas and scripts into captivating 5–10 minute YouTube videos.

You’ll work closely with the channel owner, receive storyboards and narration samples, and edit them into polished videos ready for upload.



???? Key Responsibilities

• Edit 5–10 minute YouTube videos using narration, background music, stock clips, and graphics.

• Add animations, titles, and motion graphics that enhance storytelling.

• Use visuals, transitions, and effects that maintain viewer engagement and emotional flow.

• Maintain a consistent documentary and cinematic tone aligned with the channel’s brand.

• Deliver completed videos within agreed deadlines (1–2 videos per week).



???? Required Technical Skills & Experience

• Minimum 1 year experience in professional video editing.

• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or DaVinci Resolve.

• Comfortable with Different AI Tools

• Experience with story-driven YouTube editing or documentary-style projects.

• Strong understanding of colour grading, pacing, and cinematic composition.

• Ability to source and integrate royalty-free stock footage, sound effects, and music or AI generate Image, Videos and Music.



? Desired (Bonus) Skills

• Experience creating YouTube thumbnails or simple motion graphics intros.

• Familiarity with AI-assisted video tools (Runway, Pika, or similar).

• Background or interest in history, anthropology, or human civilization.



???? Soft Skills

We’re looking for someone who is:

• Creative and detail-oriented — able to visually interpret ideas and scripts.

• Reliable and punctual — meets deadlines consistently.

• Communicative and responsive — open to feedback and collaboration.

• A problem-solver — able to find innovative ways to visualize abstract concepts.



???? Work Schedule & Pay

• Flexible hours — work at your own pace as long as deadlines are met.

• $25 per completed video (5–10 minutes).

• Rate will increase based on performance and quality.

• Opportunity for long-term, full-time position if collaboration works well.

• You’ll be paid per video, via Your Payment Avenue of Choice 



???? Career Growth

If your work aligns well with our production style, this role can evolve into a full-time video editor position with consistent projects, bonuses, and leadership opportunities as the channel grows.



???? How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. Use the subject line: “I’m Your Next Civilization Video Editor”

2. A short introduction about yourself and your experience with video editing.

3. Links to 3–5 samples of your best video editing work (preferably YouTube or documentary style).

4. Mention what software you use and your typical turnaround time per video.



Ready to help us tell the story of human civilization? Apply now and let’s create timeless content together!

title: High School Math Teacher in Online School
description:

We are currently looking for a passionate, native-level English-speaking teacher who loves working with children and believes that learning should be engaging, interactive, and fun. If you enjoy creating inspiring lessons and connecting with young learners — we would love to meet you!

- Deliver engaging and interactive online lessons to students aged 7–18

- Assess students’ language levels and track their progress

- Provide constructive and encouraging feedback

- Create a positive and motivating learning environment

- Most importantly — enjoy the teaching process and inspire your students!



What we’re looking for:

- Native or near-native level of English

- TEFL/CELTA certification (especially with a focus on young learners) is a plus

- Experience teaching Mathematics (or a relevant degree) is required

- Confidence in using interactive and game-based teaching methods

- Experience with online teaching platforms is an advantage

- Strong communication skills and a positive, energetic attitude



What we offer:

- Stable full-time contract

- Fixed schedule (minimum 20 hours per week)

- A friendly and supportive international team

- Ongoing professional development and training

- Competitive compensation (details discussed during the interview)



? Join SHKOLA and become part of a team that makes learning meaningful, enjoyable, and inspiring every day!

title: Video Editor na May Puso sa Craft — Real Estate & Brand Content (Toronto Company)
description:
Hindi ito generic na job post. Basahin mo muna bago mag-apply.



Kami ay isang production company sa Toronto, Canada (Mshati Productions / TRE Media). Naghahanap kami ng video editor na based sa Pilipinas. Hindi lang basta editor. Kailangan namin ng may taste, may style, at may disiplina mag-deliver nang hindi kailangang habulin.



Matagal na kaming nagtatrabaho kasama ang mga Filipino editor. May mga naging magaling. May mga biglang nawala. May mga nag-deliver na parang pinindot lang ang "auto-edit" tapos umalis na. Ayaw na namin nun.



Kung ikaw yung tipo na:

- Pumipili ng sariling music kasi alam mo kung ano ang bagay sa video

- Nag-e-edit na parang ikaw ang may-ari ng project

- Hindi naghihintay ng instruction para sa bawat cut

- Nagpapaalam agad kung may problema sa footage o sa brief

- May sariling taste at hindi lang sinusunod ang template



...ituloy mo ang pagbasa.



ANG TRABAHO



Mag-e-edit ka ng real estate property tours at brand content para sa Canadian market.



Bawat property, kailangan:

- 1 horizontal cinematic video (16:9, 1:30-2:30) para sa MLS/YouTube/website

- 1 vertical reel (9:16, 30-60 segundo) para sa Instagram/TikTok



Volume: 3-5 properties bawat linggo. Minsan mas marami.



Hindi lang real estate. Meron din kaming brand/corporate video, social content, at event recaps.



KAILANGAN NAMIN



Required:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (ito ang primary NLE namin, walang ibang option)

- Magaling sa pacing, music selection, at colour grading

- Computer na kaya ang 4K 10-bit footage nang walang lag

- Mabilis at stable na internet + experience sa Dropbox para sa malalaking files

- Kaya magtrabaho mag-isa

- Responsive sa communication. Mag-reply within 1 hour sa work hours mo.



ANG PINAKA-IMPORTANTE: RELIABILITY AT COMMUNICATION



Ito ang dahilan kung bakit maraming editor ang hindi tumatagal sa amin:

- Nag-ghost pagkatapos ng ilang linggo. Walang pasabi, biglang nawala.

- Hindi nag-u-update. Kailangan pa naming mag-follow up kung nasaan na ang edit.

- Nami-miss ang deadline tapos walang warning.

- Naghihintay bago kumilos. Kung walang music sa brief, pumili ka.



Kung ikaw ay:

- Laging on time o nagpapaalam nang maaga kung may problema

- Nag-u-update kahit walang nagtatanong

- Hindi nawawala sa gitna ng project

- Tinatrato ang trabaho na parang sarili mong negosyo



...ikaw ang hinahanap namin.



English fluency ay REQUIRED. Lahat ng briefs, feedback, at client communication ay sa English. Kailangan clear at professional.



Tingnan mo ang trabaho namin: 
dia at 



Turnaround: first cut within 24 hours. Final within 48.



Hindi kami naghahanap ng pinaka-mura. Naghahanap kami ng pinaka-reliable na may sariling taste.



PARA MAG-APPLY



Isama mo LAHAT ng mga ito:

1. Portfolio: 2-3 video projects na in-edit mo (links, hindi screenshots)

2. Computer specs: CPU, GPU, RAM, internet speed

3. Rate mo: per hour sa USD

4. Availability: ilang oras bawat araw, ilang araw bawat linggo

5. Simulan ang cover letter mo sa salitang "KULAY" para malaman naming binasa mo ito.



Walang generic na cover letters. Ipakita mo ang trabaho mo.

• Drive qualified leads to our application form via content and CTAs

• Earn base pay for page management PLUS commission on every qualified client you send our way



---



COMMISSION STRUCTURE:

• 1–5 qualified clients/month = 25%

• 5–10 qualified clients/month = 30%

• 10+ qualified clients/month = 35%



This role has serious earning potential. The base keeps you stable. The commission is where it grows.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

• Experience creating short-form video content for Instagram or TikTok

• Hands-on experience with AI video or UGC tools (HeyGen, D-ID, Runway, CapCut, etc.)

• Understanding of what drives engagement in finance or business content

• Ability to write simple, compelling scripts for AI-generated creators

• Self-managed, consistent, and growth-oriented

• Long-term commitment — building a page takes time and we need someone who understands that



---



PAY & TERMS:

• $12/hr base pay for content creation and page management

• Commission on top (structure above)

• Paid bi-weekly every Friday via PayPal or Wise



---



TO APPLY, answer these questions:

1. Have you created AI-generated video content before? What tools did you use?

2. Have you managed a social media page from scratch? What niche and what results?

3. Share an example of content you've created (link, screenshot, or description).

4. How many posts per week can you realistically commit to?

5. Do you understand the finance/funding niche or are you willing to learn it?

6. What is your daily availability?

7. PayPal or Wise — active account?

8. How soon can you start?



Applications without answers will not receive a response. This is a long-term role for someone serious about building something.

title: Faceless Youtube Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a skilled video editor to help produce engaging, high-retention YouTube videos for a travel-focused channel.



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent weekly work for the right person.



What You’ll Do:

-Edit 15–20 minute YouTube videos using provided scripts and voiceovers

-Source and insert relevant B-roll (travel footage, city clips, lifestyle visuals, etc.)

-Add smooth transitions, light motion graphics, zooms, and cuts to keep the video engaging

-Sync visuals with the voiceover for strong storytelling and pacing

-Maintain fast pacing to maximize viewer retention

-Add background music and sound effects where appropriate



Style We’re Going For:

-Similar to channels like “Travel Awaits You” — clean, engaging, and documentary-style storytelling (not over-edited, but not boring).



Requirements:

-Experience editing YouTube videos (please provide samples)

-Strong sense of pacing and storytelling

-Ability to find high-quality B-roll footage

-Good internet connection for file transfers

-Attention to detail and ability to follow direction



Nice to Have:

-Experience with travel or documentary-style content

-Understanding of YouTube retention and viewer psychology

-Basic motion graphics skills

title: YouTube Voice Over Artist
description:
We are looking for a long-term voice over artist for a growing YouTube channel focused on U.S. towns, abandoned places, and interesting facts.

This is a faceless YouTube channel where your voice will be the main storytelling element, so clarity, tone, and engagement are very important.

Your role is simple:

You will record raw voiceover footage (and on-screen presence if needed)

You only need to appear on camera for approximately 10% of the video

All videos should be submitted unedited — our team will handle all editing

This is a long-term position with consistent weekly work.

title: Ai Veo Video Editor
description:
We are hiring a skilled AI video editor who can create realistic avatar-style videos using VEO (Flow). This is a long-term opportunity with consistent work for the right candidate. The workflow is structured and efficient once learned, and compensation is based on output and performance.



Job Responsibilities:



Generate and edit AI avatar videos using VEO

Follow provided scripts, images, and creative direction

Execute video creation with strong attention to detail and realism



Core Requirements:



Must use VEO (Flow) for video generation

VEO generates a maximum of 8 seconds per clip

Create videos in segments (8 seconds at a time)

Generate 4 variations per scene

Build videos sentence by sentence for proper pacing and accuracy



Voice and Audio Requirements:



Voice must remain consistent throughout the entire video

Same accent, tone, and delivery across all clips

Add “(CHINESE ACCENT)” under each sentence in the prompt

Lip sync must match naturally

No glitches or mismatched audio



Avatar Consistency:



Avatar must remain consistent across all clips

Facial structure must not change

Teeth must remain exactly the same across all clips (very important)

No distortion, warping, or identity changes



Video Style:



No excessive or unnatural movements

Camera must feel stable and realistic (like natural phone footage)

Final output must look human and natural, not “AI-generated”



Editing Requirements:



Must use CapCut on desktop or laptop

Combine all clips into one seamless video

Add default captions (white text with black outline)

Ensure smooth transitions and natural pacing

No awkward cuts



Required Test Task (Mandatory):



Sign up for VEO Flow and use free credits

Create a 30-second sample video using a provided image

Must demonstrate:

Voice consistency

Sentence-by-sentence pacing

Stable avatar appearance

Clean editing

Proper captions

Applications without a sample video will not be considered



Compensation:



Paid per minute of completed video

Performance bonuses available

High performers will receive:

More volume

Long-term work

Increased pay



Ideal Candidate:



Experience with AI video tools (VEO preferred)

Strong attention to detail

Ability to create realistic, natural-looking videos

Fast turnaround and reliable communication

Can follow instructions exactly



How to Apply:



Submit your 30-second sample video

Include relevant experience

Confirm you understand all requirements

title: Skilled Crocheter (2+ crochet yrs exp)
description:
We are looking for a talented and experienced Crochet Designer and Pattern Writer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have the expertise to translate photos or design concepts into crochet patterns and guide others in replicating the design.



This job is a long term contract based WFH job with potential bonus for really skilled artisans.

title: Client Call Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing structural engineering firm based in Australia and is currently looking for a confident and composed male Client Call Coordinator with a strong direct background in client calls and client meetings and has worked in a coordinator project management before. A full-time role from 7:00 AM to 3:30 pm Philippines time, weekdays only.



This role involves direct communication with clients— particularly those related to project delays, drawing status, or technical concerns. Your key responsibility is to act as the first point of contact on the phone, provide a warm and professional experience for the client, and coordinate internally with our design team to ensure timely resolutions.



We are ideally looking for someone who is comfortable under pressure, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys solving  in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Answer incoming client phone calls regarding project updates, delays, or technical questions.



Reassure and guide clients calmly and professionally — especially in high-pressure or escalated situations.



Gather relevant information from clients to assist internal design teams.



Follow up on requests with the design team and ensure clients receive timely responses.



Maintain detailed records of calls and follow-ups using internal systems.



Escalate urgent or complex issues to the appropriate internal tea
mbers.



Build and maintain strong client relationships through consistent and reliable communication.



Assist in improving call-handling procedures and response workflows.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



A university degree or diploma



Previous experience in a client-facing or coordination role is highly desirable.



Exposure or experience in an engineering or construction industry is a MUST.



Excellent verbal communication skills with a calm and empathetic phone manner.



Ability to handle pressure, de-escalate tense situations, and remain composed under stress.



Strong organizational and time management skills.



Comfortable with regular phone interaction as the core part of the role.



Basic understanding of engineering or construction drawings is a PLUS.



Proficient in using collaboration tools (e.g., Teams, CRM systems, call logging software).



NICE TO HAVE:



Experience working with internal engineering or design teams.



Prior work in a support or help desk-style role involving technical discussions.



To apply and be considered, please follow the below: 



1. Please send a link to your most updated CV and a short recording link explaining your relevant experience to the role.

2. Use 3 apply points.



Only those applicants who follow the above instructions will be contacted.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist (100% Remote / Full-Time)
description:
Are you a Google Ads wizard who lives and breathes ROI?



At Zest Digital Marketing, we don’t just run ads; we craft high-converting strategies that scale businesses. We are looking for a data-driven, results-oriented Senior Google Ads Manager to join our growing team. If you can turn complex data into winning campaigns, we want you!



 Why Join Us?



100% Remote: Work from the comfort of your home.



Full-Time Stability: No more chasing freelance gigs; enjoy a steady, long-term role.



Professional Growth: Collaborate with a team that values innovation and fresh ideas.



Impact: Take full ownership of high-budget accounts and see your results move the needle.



 Your Mission:



Set up, manage, and optimize high-performing Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube).



Conduct deep-dive keyword research and competitive analysis.



Perform continuous A/B testing on ad copies and landing pages.



Monitor daily performance and provide insightful reports with actionable improvements.



Stay ahead of the curve with the latest Google Ads trends and algorithm updates.



 What You Bring to the Table:



Proven Experience: 3+ years managing Google Ads with a track record of scaling accounts.



Analytical Mindset: Expert at Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and conversion tracking.



Strategic Thinking: You don't just follow instructions; you suggest better ways to hit KPIs.



Communication: Fluent English (written and verbal) is a must.



Reliability: You are organized, deadline-driven, and work well independently.



How to Apply:

Ready to bring your "Zest" to our team?



Send us your latest CV. 



Include a brief summary of your biggest Google Ads win (e.g., how you improved ROAS or reduced CPA).



Let’s scale together!

title: Google Ads Strategist (Part-Time & Remote)
description:
Are you a master of the Google Search Engine and Display Network? We are seeking a results-oriented Google Ads Specialist to spearhead our search marketing efforts. This is a flexible, part-time remote position designed for a self-starter who thrives on optimizing conversions and dominating the SERPs.



The Mission

Strategic Execution: Design and launch high-performing Google Ads campaigns (Search, YouTube, and Performance Max).



Optimization: Conduct deep-dive keyword research and refine bidding strategies to lower CPA.



Tracking & Analytics: Monitor account health and provide clear, data-backed reports on monthly progress.



Creative Input: Collaborate on high-converting ad copy and landing page improvements.



What We’re Looking For

Technical Expertise: Deep proficiency in Google Ads Manager and Google Analytics (GA4).



Precision: An eye for detail—you don't just "set and forget" campaigns; you fine-tune them.



Reliability: Ability to manage your own hours effectively while meeting project deadlines.



Integrity: Strict adherence to advertising guidelines to ensure long-term account stability.



Perks & Benefits

Work from Anywhere: Total location independence.



Premium Compensation: We offer a competitive hourly rate/monthly retainer that reflects your skill level.



Streamlined Workflow: No micromanagement—just clear goals and the autonomy to reach them.



Performance Bonuses: Exceptional results are recognized and rewarded.



Ready to Apply?

If you have a track record of turning clicks into customers, we want to see your work.



Send your portfolio and CV to: 



Subject: Google Ads Expert - [Your Name]



Join us and help us scale our reach through smarter search!

description:

title: Outreach Coordinator
description:
JOB OVERVIEW:  We are building a mission-driven outreach system focused on helping individuals and families gain financial clarity, reduce debt, and create more freedom in their lives. We are inviting churches and organizations across the United States to host a free 1-hour workshop titled “The Accelerated Mortgage & Student Loan Elimination Method. ”The workshop is presented by Larry Cheatham, President of Alliance Apex Solutions Inc., a highly respected financial educator, entrepreneur, investor, and speaker. A former professional firefighter, Larry has spoken to audiences of thousands across the country and has delivered high-value financial training to leadership teams at multimillion-dollar companies. He brings decades of real-world experience and a genuine passion for helping families achieve biblical financial freedom through practical stewardship. This practical, faith-based workshop teaches families how to pay off a 30-year mortgage in 7–10 years and eliminate student loans faster — all while using the exact same monthly budget they already have. No refinancing, no gimmicks, and no lifestyle changes. 



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Outreach Coordinator to help us connect with churches and organizations across the United States. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who communicates well, follows instructions, and takes pride in doing meaningful work.



HOURS:

• Part-Time: 4 hours/day

• Monday–Friday

• 20 hours/week  



PAY:

• $400–$500/month

• Paid bi-weekly or monthly

• Opportunity for increases based on performance  



YOUR ROLE:

You will help us reach churches and organizations by sending personalized outreach
s inviting pastors and leaders to host the free workshop for their congregation. This is NOT spam or mass
 work. Each message is personalized and written with care.



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Research churches and organizations (U.S.-based)

• Identify decision-makers (Pastors, Leaders, Coordinators)

• Personalize pre-written outreach
s

• Send 15–20
s per day

• Manage follow-up messages

• Respond to interested organizations

• Book calls on our calendar

• Track all activity in Google Sheets  



TARGET ORGANIZATIONS:

• Churches (Senior Pastors, Ministry Leaders)

• Adult small groups (men’s, women’s, marriage groups)

• Community organizations

• Professional groups and associations  



REQUIRED SKILLS:

• Strong written English (clear, natural, respectful tone)

• Ability to follow instructions exactly

• Attention to detail

• Comfortable using Google Sheets and
 tools

• Reliable internet connection

• Consistent daily availability  



IDEAL CANDIDATE:

You are someone who:

• Communicates in a warm, respectful, and natural way

• Understands how to speak professionally to church leaders

• Takes initiative and ownership

• Is organized and consistent

• Enjoys meaningful, purpose-driven work  



REQUIRED WRITING TEST (VERY IMPORTANT):  Write a short outreach
 to:  Pastor Michael Johnson at Grace Community 

Church.



Your
 should:

• Be warm and respectful

• Feel personal (not generic)

• Mention the free workshop titled “The Accelerated Mortgage & Student Loan Elimination Method” presented by Larry Cheatham and briefly explain its value to the congregation

• Be written in your own words

• Be no more than 6–8 sentences  



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):  You must follow ALL instructions below or your application will NOT be considered:



Subject Line – Outreach Coordinator Application – [Your Name]  

Writing Test – Include your
 to “Pastor Michael Johnson” at the TOP of your application  



Short Answer – In 1–2 sentences, tell us: Why does this role interest you personally?  

Experience – List any experience you have with:

•
 outreach

• Virtual assistant work

• Research or lead generation  



Confirmation Line – At the end of your application, write: “I follow instructions carefully and pay attention to details.”



HOW WE SELECT CANDIDATES:



We review applications based on:

• Writing quality and tone

• Ability to follow instructions

• Attention to detail

• Personalization effort

• Professional communication  



NEXT STEPS:

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short Zoom interview.

We are looking to hire quickly and begin onboarding within a few days.

Gemini said

title: Senior SEO & WordPress Specialist (Local SEO)
description:
KMElectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We are looking for a full-time SEO and WordPress specialist to help manage and improve our online presence.



This role is ideal for someone experienced with local SEO, WordPress websites, and how to rank service businesses on Google.



You will be responsible for improving our website performance, increasing search rankings, managing content updates, Google My Business and helping generate more leads through organic search.



This is a long-term, full-time position for someone who wants to grow with our company.



Responsibilities



• Manage and maintain our WordPress website

• Implement on-page SEO improvements

• Create and optimise service pages for local suburbs

• Improve website speed and performance

• Monitor rankings and SEO performance

• Manage Google Business Profile optimisation

• Build internal links and improve site structure

• Publish blog posts and website content

• Assist with technical SEO fixes

• Work with us to improve lead generation



Requirements



• Strong experience with WordPress

• Good understanding of SEO (especially Local SEO)

• Experience with tools like Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Ability to optimise website content and pages for search engines

• Knowledge of site speed optimisation

• Good written English

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work full-time and communicate regularly

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress builders

• Basic graphic design skills

• Experience with AI tools for content writing



Working Hours



Full-time position (40 hours per week).



We are based in Australia, so some overlap with Australian business hours is preferred.



Why Work With Us



• Long-term position with a growing company

• Stable full-time work

• Opportunity to manage and grow our entire online presence

• Work directly with the business owner



Please include the following in your application:



1. Your SEO experience

Applications without examples of past work may not be considered.

title: E-Commerce Expert
description:
eCommerce Integrations & Marketplace Specialist (Remote – Philippines)

Long-term role | Technical | Real systems work

We are an established Australian eCommerce business looking for a highly capable technical specialist to manage product integrations, data feeds, and marketplace connections across multiple sales channels. Essentially you will be responsible for everything that goes on the website.  

This is not a basic VA role. We are looking for someone who genuinely understands systems, feeds, APIs, and marketplace platforms, shipping calculators.

________________________________________

What you’ll be responsible for

• Managing product integrations between our website and marketplaces

• Maintaining and troubleshooting Amazon Seller Central and eBay Seller Hub listings

• Managing product feeds (Google Merchant Center, Meta, marketplaces)

• Diagnosing and fixing feed errors (attributes, mapping, GTINs, variants, categories, etc.)

• Working with API connections and third-party tools (feed managers, channel managers, middleware)

• Ensuring stock, pricing, SKUs, and product data sync correctly across channels

• Troubleshooting integration issues when products fail to publish or update

• Basic HTML edits for product data when needed

• Communicating clearly about technical issues and solutions

________________________________________

Essential skills (you must have real experience with these)

• Amazon Seller Central

• eBay Seller Hub

• Product feeds and data mapping

• Google Merchant Center diagnostics

• Marketplace listing management

• Understanding of SKUs, variants, GTINs, categories, attributes

________________________________________

• Experience with Shopify / WooCommerce integrations

• Experience with Australian marketplaces (Catch, Kogan, MyDeal)

• Zapier / Make / automation tools

• Experience supporting stores with large catalogues

________________________________________

How to apply (important)

To filter serious candidates, start your application with the word:

INTEGRATION

Then include:

• A brief summary of your experience with Amazon and eBay

• Examples of marketplaces or stores you’ve managed

• Tools/platforms you’ve used for feeds or integrations

• Your hourly rate

• Your internet speed and availability

Applications that do not follow this instruction will be ignored.

________________________________________

Pay & role details

• Fully remote

• Long-term role for the right person

• Pay based on skill level 

________________________________________

Who this role is perfect for

• eCommerce technical managers

• Integration / feed specialists

• People who enjoy solving data, feed and sync problems

________________________________________
