• Social media managers

• Basic product listers

title: Senior Video Editor (PH Night Shift | Pacific Standard Time)
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Influencer Coordinator
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking an Influencer Coordinator / Affiliate Outreach Coordinator to support and scale a fast-growing brand’s affiliate and creator partnerships. This role focuses on building strong relationships with creators, managing ongoing campaigns, tracking performance, and ensuring timely execution across deliverables, payments, and content documentation. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to help grow a high-performing influencer and affiliate ecosystem aligned with broader marketing and growth objectives.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and optimize relationships with existing and prospective affiliate and influencer partners

- Maintain regular communication with assigned creators to ensure deliverables are met, contracts are followed, and content quality standards are upheld

- Monitor trends and patterns across social and digital marketing efforts to identify new opportunities

- Coordinate with internal teams on payment terms, schedules, and delivery to ensure creators are paid accurately and on time

- Track and document all content produced by creators in designated folders and internal systems

- Log creator posts daily, including publish dates, performance metrics, and post links

- Contract a targeted number of creators on a weekly basis to meet campaign and business goals

- Source, evaluate, and engage new influencer and affiliate partners across platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, and

- Negotiate and manage influencer partnerships while maintaining strong, ongoing relationships

- Review influencer content to ensure compliance with brand guidelines, tone, and messaging prior to posting

- Assist in creating influencer briefs, one-pagers, and campaign documentation aligned with marketing objectives

- Collaborate with design and content teams to support the creation of high-quality social and creator-led content



Requirements:

- Minimum of 3 years of experience in influencer coordination, affiliate outreach, or a related role

- Strong expertise across major social media platforms, particularly Instagram and TikTok

- Solid understanding of marketing metrics and the ability to analyze performance data and KPIs

- Experience with editorial and social media content development, with a foundational understanding of digital design and user experience principles

- Proven track record of successfully managing and scaling influencer or affiliate programs

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail

- Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple creators and deadlines simultaneously

- Experience working in a high-growth or startup environment; SaaS or B2B experience is a strong plus

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
We are seeking a proactive Sales Development Representative (SDR) to support our sales team by generating and booking qualified meetings with hospitality businesses. The primary focus of this role is outbound prospecting through cold calls, reference checks, and referrals to identify potential clients and schedule meetings for the sales team.



The ideal candidate speaks clear and professional English, is comfortable conducting outbound calls, and has prior experience working in the hospitality industry. This background will help build credibility and rapport when engaging with restaurant, hotel, and hospitality operators.



Responsibilities:



Outbound Prospecting

Conduct outbound cold calls to hospitality businesses to introduce the company’s staffing solutions

Use reference checks and referrals to uncover new potential prospects

Identify decision makers and qualify potential opportunities



Meeting Generation

Schedule qualified discovery meetings for the sales team

Ensure prospects meet the target customer profile before booking meetings

Maintain a consistent daily outreach cadence through calls and follow ups



Pipeline and CRM Management

Track outreach activity, prospects, and meetings in the CRM system

Maintain accurate records of interactions and follow up opportunities

Collaborate with the sales team to ensure a smooth handoff of qualified leads



Requirements:

Previous experience in sales development, lead generation, cold calling, or outbound sales

Clear and professional English communication skills

Comfortable conducting high volume outbound calls

Strong interpersonal and relationship building skills

Previous work experience in the hospitality industry

Experience working in a B2B platform company or technology company is preferred

Experience using CRM platforms to track outreach activity and manage pipeline is preferred

title: Cold Call Script Writer (Freelance/Contract)
description:
Job Opportunity: Cold Call Script Writer (Freelance/Contract)



IMPORTANT: This is a project-based contract role (freelancers) with the potential for ongoing optimization work.



ABOUT THE TEAM

We are an innovative real estate team in the Charlotte, NC market focused on providing our clients an incredible experience through high-quality content, cutting-edge technology, and genuine personal interaction. We are proudly the highest-value, highest-cost real estate team in greater Charlotte, competing on skill, service, and results—not on price.



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! [
]



Our Core Values:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs and delivering outstanding service.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



THE MISSION

Our team is demand-constrained, and we are launching a brand-new Cold Outbound division to unlock a controllable, repeatable revenue channel. Your mission is to architect the exact words, rebuttals, and frameworks our callers will use to scale us to 12 outbound deals per month.



You will not be making the calls; you are the strategist and copywriter. You will design scripts targeting property owners in the $500K–$900K range who are 5–10x more likely to transact based on predictive data (REI SIFT). Your scripts must accomplish two simultaneous goals on every call: Account Verification and Appointment Setting.



DELIVERABLES & ACCOUNTABILITIES

Script Engineering & Qualification Frameworks



First-Contact Scripts: Design high-converting cold call scripts tailored for predictive-data seller leads in the greater Charlotte area (Lake Norman, South Charlotte).



RANTS Qualification Rubric: Develop a qualification framework and script integration utilizing the RANTS methodology (Reason, Ability, Needs, Timing, Stopping them) to help callers rank leads into A/B/C/D tiers.



Objection Handling Guide: Build a comprehensive rebuttal playbook addressing specific market nuances, high-net-worth seller objections, and trust-building for high-ticket real estate.



Strategic Iteration (Post-Launch)



Real-Data Refinement: Collaborate with our Director of Sales (Lukas) to refine scripts based on real objection data and call recordings once our "hell week" of dialing begins.



Multi-Channel Alignment: Ensure script tonality aligns with our warm follow-up infrastructure, including SMS,
 drips, and our extensive organic YouTube content library.



REQUIREMENTS

Experience & Capability



Real Estate Outbound Experience: Proven track record of writing high-converting cold calling scripts for Real Estate ISAs, Sales Agents, or outbound teams.



Predictive Data Expertise: Familiarity with scripting for predictive algorithm leads (e.g., REI SIFT) rather than just standard expireds or FSBOs.



Framework Knowledge: Deep understanding of the RANTS qualification framework or highly similar enterprise sales qualification methodologies.



Tech Context: Working knowledge of GoHighLevel (GHL) to understand howscript outcomes map to CRM pipeline stages and tagging.



Key Skills & Competencies



Strategic Copywriting: You understand that a script isn't just dialogue; it's a psychological pathway to uncover a prospect's timeline and motivation.



Data-Driven Adjustments: You can listen to recorded calls, pinpoint exactly where the language failed to build rapport, and rewrite the sequence to bypass the sticking point.



Speed & Collaboration: Ability to deliver the initial script package rapidly and iterate smoothly based on feedback from our Director of Sales and Paid Ads Consultant.



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS

STEP 1: Application Please submit your application >>
. 

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 30- mins case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.

title: Sales Supervisor / Team Lead – Merchant Services & POS (Work From Home | Philippines)
description:
Location: Philippines (Remote / Work From Home)

Market: United States (U.S. Restaurants & Businesses)

Industry: Food Service, POS Systems, and Credit Card Merchant Services

Position Overview

We are looking for an experienced Sales Supervisor / Team Lead to oversee sales representatives and support staff serving U.S.-based restaurants and businesses. This is a leadership role for someone who knows how to manage people, monitor performance, support customers, and keep a team accountable.

This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who can lead from the front, oversee daily operations, help staff improve, and make sure the team delivers results.

Knowledge of credit card merchant services and POS systems is a strong plus.

What the Team Sells

Private-label hot sauce for restaurants

Specialty bakery and bread products

POS systems

Credit card merchant services

These are established products and services with strong sales potential in the U.S. market.

Key Responsibilities

Supervise and oversee sales representatives and other staff

Monitor daily call activity, follow-up, productivity, and overall performance

Coach tea
mbers on sales process, objection handling, and closing techniques

Make sure staff follow company procedures, scripts, and customer service standards

title: Virtual Assistant YouTube Manager
description:
Are you detail oriented and a clear communicator? We are looking for a YouTube manager to proofread video scripts and quality check YouTube videos for our faceless YouTube channels. The purpose of this role is to ensure our scripts and videos are polished, engaging, and ready to go viral. This role also involves communication with teams, uploading finalized videos to our YouTube channels, and ensuring every detail is accurate and optimized for success.



If you have an eye for catching errors, improving content, communicating feedback, and understanding how  YouTube works, we’d love to have you on our team!



Responsibilities:

- Script Review: Proofread scripts and provide constructive feedback to writers.

- Video Review: Watch videos to check for errors and note discrepancies, and provide clear feedback.

- Team Management: Maintain strong communication with the freelance team of writers and video editors, in addition to maintaining our SOPs up to date.

- Video Uploading: Upload finalized videos to the YouTube channels with titles, descriptions, tags, end screens, and thumbnails.



Requirements:

- Experience in proofreading, editing, or writing.

- Experience in video editing faceless videos.

- MUST have strong attention to detail.

- Understand the fundamentals of YouTube CTR, retention, and hooks.

- Clear and professional communication skills for giving feedback and communicating with the team.

- Complete a QC test to assess your skills.



Pay:

- $3 USD per hour

- Paid on the 1st and 15th of every month.

- Must have a Payoneer in your name linked to onlinejobs.

- Growth opportunity based on performance.

- About 20 - 30 hours a week and flexible hours.



If you are interested, just send a quick message with your experience and "YTMA26" as the subject, so we know you are serious. If you have the experience we are looking for, we will send you the application/ test task link.



We appreciate all applicants, and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales Admin Analyst (FMCG experience needed)
description:
Sales Admin Analyst.



Premium Australian BPO is seeking an experienced Sales Support Analyst for our client, a global Fast-Moving-Consumer-Goods (FMCG) company specializing in personal care products and brands.



This Full-Time role offers the flexibility of Working-From-Home (WFH) during AUS business hours. Also offering a market leading salary package- including paid leave and + bonuses. Join this global FMCG company, as a key player on their AUS sales teams.



This role represents an incredible opportunity for both professional and personal growth and to fast-track your career on a global stage.





****Key Responsibilities Include****



* Supporting the National Business Manager (NBM) with key data administrative tasks.

* Inputting key data into Trade Promotion Management (TPM) systems- specifically, Promax- ensuring data integrity and accuracy.

* Accurate transfer of data from various sources into TPM/Promax systems.

* Maintenance of baselines, promotions, pricing, forecasts and ensuring data integrity- what is loaded in Promax matches what is loaded in customer portals / promotional advice forms.

* Providing key insights on data.

* Identifying issues/discrepancies with data.

* Reviewing forecast accuracy versus business plans.

* Attending Pre S&OP Forecast meetings to take action notes and reflect actions/changes in Promax.

* Assisting with data Audit requirements. Data matching from various sources.

* Complete promotional reconciliation weekly or as required (Scan promotions vs accrued Scan monies) and provide written feedback on if the promotion met expectations, was below or above expectations.

* Help prepare comprehensive sales data reports in Excel. Weekly & Monthly Sales Reports categorized by SKU, account, and area, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

* Using Excel for data entry and data analysis. Pivot Tables, V Lookups, Sum & Average.





****Key Requirements MUST HAVES include****



* Strong background in sales and strong understanding of key sales principles. Including maintenance of baselines, promotions, pricing and forecasting.

* Expertise in Excel. Advanced functions including Pivot Tables, V Lookups, Sum & Average.

* Excellent communication and comprehension skills.

* Highest level of proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

* Ability to work as part of a cross functional team.

* Meticulous attention to detail.

* Highly Analytical- able to interpret data, provide some analysis and data-driven recommendations.

* Highly organized- able to juggle multiple tasks, meeting timelines and deadlines.

* Attentive, communicative, analytical and energetic. A problem-solver who can work independently and as part of a dynamic team.



****IDEAL candidates have****

* 2 + years proven previous experience within the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) industry.

*Have experience with Trade Promotion Management Systems (TPM) such as Promax, SAP or Oracle.

* Have experience with Trade Promotion Optimization Tools (TPO).

* Have a degree/background in Business Administration, Information Systems, Data Analytics, Accounting or a related field.



****You Will Be Provided With****

*Comprehensive training in Promax (TPM) and (TPO).

*A designated work laptop.



****You Will Be Responsible for Providing****

*A monitor

*Fast and Reliable Internet.

*Back-up Internet options

*Back-up Power options.

*Having a designated WFH space- free from distraction.





Please write a short cover letter detailing your relevant experience and skillset. You MUST include your CV as part of your application.



Thank you

title: Media Relations Specialist
description:
Media Relations Specialist for U.S. PR Agency



PLEASE NOTE: This role is for a media relations specialist to pitch U.S. media. We are only able to consider applicants who have previous hands-on experience pitching and securing earned media coverage in U.S. media outlets. 



About Us



We are a B2B PR and marketing agency based in the US, helping our B2B clients achieve their marketing goals. We're looking for a talented and experienced media relations specialist to join our team.



The Role



As a media relations specialist, you will play a critical role in securing media coverage for our B2B clients in the US market. You will develop and execute strategic media relations campaigns to raise brand awareness, generate leads, and position our clients as thought leaders in their industries.



Responsibilities:



- Research and identify relevant media outlets in the US for our B2B clients.

- Develop targeted media pitches and press releases tailored to each outlet.

- Build and maintain relationships with journalists and editors in the US media landscape.

- Secure media placements for our clients in online, print, and broadcast media.

- Monitor media coverage and provide reports on campaign performance.

- Stay up-to-date on industry trends and best practices in B2B media relations.



Qualifications:



- Minimum 3 years of experience in media relations or public relations, preferably with a focus on B2B clients.

- Strong understanding of the US media landscape, including trade publications and online media outlets.

- Excellent writing and communication skills, with the ability to craft compelling press releases and media pitches.

- Proven ability to build and maintain positive relationships with media contacts.

- Experience with media monitoring tools a plus.

- Familiarity with time zone differences and ability to work effectively with a US-based team.

- Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.



Benefits



- Competitive hourly rate (negotiable based on experience)

- Remote work with flexible work schedule

- Opportunity to work with a diverse range of B2B clients

- Be part of a growing and dynamic agency



To Apply



Please submit your resume, cover letter, and writing sample (press release or media pitch) to 
 your cover letter, please tell us why you're interested in this role and how your experience makes you a strong fit for our team.



Note: This is a 1099 independent contractor position. You will be responsible for your own taxes and benefits.

title: Remote Operations Manager — Singapore Events & Catering Group
description:
About Us

We are a Singapore-headquartered group with 12 companies, 97 staff across 5 countries, and over 11,200 events delivered across 28 years. Our brands cover Indian weddings, catering, corporate events, floral, videography, and more. The CEO needs a sharp, disciplined operations person to oversee daily execution across teams so he can focus on growth.

What You'll Do

This is not a typical VA role. You will be the CEO's eyes and ears across the business daily.



Morning check-in with all teams: admin, designers, SEO, marketing, sales, on-site crew

Verify daily scope of work is being executed — not just assigned, but completed

Track all incoming leads for two main brands and report conversion numbers daily

Submit a structured end-of-day report every single day by 7pm SGT — no exceptions

Chase outstanding tasks, follow up on deliverables, flag delays before they become problems

Monitor staff performance against weekly KPIs and escalate issues

Coordinate with remote tea
mbers across India and Philippines

Manage vendor follow-ups, invoicing reminders, and client communication where needed

Prepare weekly scorecards showing green/amber/red status per team



You Must Have



Minimum 3 years experience in operations, project management, or team oversight (not data entry or admin-only roles)

Experience managing or coordinating teams of 5+ people remotely

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable with WhatsApp, Google Sheets, Excel, Slack, or similar tools

Ability to hold people accountable firmly but professionally

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

Available to start within 2 weeks



Bonus (Not Required)



Experience working with Singapore, Australia, or Middle East-based companies

Familiarity with events, weddings, or F&B industry

Experience with CRM tools or lead tracking systems



What We Offer



PHP 35,000–45,000 base depending on experience

PHP 10,000 monthly performance bonus tied to daily report accuracy, lead response times, and team output

Long-term full-time role — we are not looking for freelancers

Direct reporting to the CEO

Clear KPIs, structured daily workflow, and proper onboarding — you will not be guessing what to do



How to Apply

Send a short message answering these three questions:



Describe a time you held a team accountable for daily output. What was the result?

What tools do you use to track tasks and deadlines?

What is your expected monthly salary in PHP?



Do not send a generic cover letter. We will not respond to copy-paste applications.

title: AI Video Editor (Kling AI)

title: GHL Marketing and Automation Specialist
description:
WHO WE ARE

7-Figure Educator® provides Black educators with the coaching, content, curriculum, and community necessary to grow six and seven figure education consulting businesses.



WHY WE DO WHAT WE DO

We do this work because we are passionate about school leadership, equity, and supporting Black educators to build their wealth.



POSITION OVERVIEW

7-Figure Educator® is hiring a CRM Marketing & Automation Specialist. The CRM Marketing & Automation Specialist is responsible for the hands-on execution of marketing campaigns and lead management workflows inside the company’s CRM platform (GoHighLevel). This role ensures that marketing strategy is translated into high-performing technical builds that support top-of-funnel lead generation, nurture sequences, and the sales pipeline.This role will report to our Manager of Marketing & Content Strategy and partner with all functions. 



This is a primarily tactical role with a strong focus on marketing automation, campaign deployment, CRM pipeline management, and performance tracking. The ideal candidate is both detail-oriented and systems-minded, with the ability to recommend the most effective technical approach to bring marketing funnels to life.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Marketing Automation Execution

- Building and updating sales pages inside GoHighLevel

- Build, launch, and maintain funnels, workflows, and automations inside GoHighLevel

- Configure forms, schedulers, landing pages, triggers, campaigns, and pipeline stages

- Implement
 and SMS campaigns using provided strategy, messaging, and assets

- Set up lead routing, tagging, segmentation, and scoring to support marketing and sales efforts

- Ensure all automations are tested, QA’d, and deployed accurately

- Manage CRM hygiene including tag accuracy, contact card updates, etc.



Campaign & Lead Management

- Manage the CRM components of top-of-funnel marketing campaigns

- Connect lead sources (ads, landing pages, website, and integrations) into the CRM

- Monitor and optimize lead flow from capture through handoff to sales

- Maintain and improve nurture sequences to increase conversion rates

- Support the execution of product launches and promotional campaigns



Sales Pipeline & Process Support

- Build and maintain pipelines that reflect the company’s sales process

- Automate task assignments, follow-ups, and internal notifications

- Ensure accurate tracking of opportunities, customer journeys, and conversion points



Data, Reporting & Optimization

- Track and report on campaign performance (opens, clicks, conversions, lead movement)

- Maintain CRM data hygiene and list health

- Identify workflow issues and performance gaps and recommend improvements

- Create and maintain simple dashboards and reporting views



Technical Strategy (Light – 10–15%)

- Recommend the most effective and scalable way to build funnels and automations

- Identify opportunities to improve efficiency through better system configuration

- Research and test new automation features and integrations



Job Qualifications

- Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience building and managing CRM or marketing automation systems

- Demonstrated experience with GoHighLevel and GHL SaaS configurator (required)

- Experience executing
 and/or SMS marketing campaigns within a CRM

- Knowledge of A2P compliance requirements

- Strong understanding of:

1. Automation workflows and triggers

2. Pipeline management

3. Lead lifecycle and segmentation

- Excellent communication across multiple function departments

- Ability to translate marketing plans into technical builds

- Strong QA and troubleshooting skills

- Excellent organizational and project management ability (Experience with ClickUp a plus)

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative remote environment

- Experience supporting lead generation and product launch campaigns

- Familiarity with marketing analytics and conversion tracking

- Experience integrating third-party tools via native integrations, Zapier, or webhooks



Key Deliverable Outcomes (First 6–12 Months)

- Our marketing campaigns are deployed accurately and on schedule.

- Our lead flow through the CRM is seamless and measurable.

- Our sales pipeline automation reduces manual work and increases follow-up consistency.

- Our nurture sequences are functioning and improving conversion rates.

- Our CRM data is clean, organized, and actionable.



Our Ideal Candidate Has These Attributes:

- Systems thinker and problem solver

- Detail-oriented and execution-focused

- Highly organized and deadline-driven

- Data-aware and results-oriented

- Collaborative and proactive communicator

title: AWS Engineer
description:
Location: [Hybrid | Type: Full-time

We are seeking a skilled AWS Engineer to design, build, deploy, and maintain scalable, secure,

and reliable cloud infrastructure on Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you will

collaborate with development, DevOps, and operations teams to support cloud-native

applications, automate infrastructure, optimize costs, and ensure high availability and

performance.

Key Responsibilities:

? Architect, deploy, and manage AWS infrastructure using core services such as EC2, S3,

VPC, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB, ECS/EKS, IAM, CloudFormation, and CloudWatch.

? Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices with tools like AWS CloudFormation,

Terraform, or AWS CDK for consistent and repeatable deployments.

? Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate application builds, testing, and

deployments.

? Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement logging, alerting, and

backup strategies to ensure reliability and compliance.

? Optimize cloud costs through resource right-sizing, reserved instances, and AWS cost

management tools.

? Enforce security best practices, including IAM policies, encryption, network security, and

compliance standards.

? Collaborate with cross-functional teams to migrate workloads to AWS, containerize

applications, and support ongoing infrastructure improvements.

Required Qualifications:

? 3+ years of hands-on experience with AWS cloud platforms and services.

? Strong proficiency in scripting and automation (e.g., Python, Bash, YAML).

? Solid understanding of networking, security, and cloud architecture principles.

? Experience with version control systems and collaborative development workflows.

? Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent

experience).

Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):

? Experience with Git for version control and Git-based workflows (e.g., GitHub Actions or

GitLab CI).

? Proficiency in Rust for building high-performance backend services or tools.

? Familiarity with React for supporting full-stack or frontend-integrated cloud applications.

title: Executive admin assistant
description:
WE’RE HIRING: Student Success Manager / WhatsApp Operations VA (Philippines — Long-Term)

Remote | UK Education (GCSE & A-Level) | Immediate Start



We’re a premium UK tutoring company (20+ years in education) scaling rapidly. Our operations run primarily through WhatsApp and we need a high-calibre Virtual Assistant / Student Success Manager to manage daily communications, onboarding, and tutor–student coordination — with a clear growth path into Setter ? Closer (high-ticket sales).



Role Summary



You will be the front-line operations backbone of the business:

• monitoring WhatsApp continuously during shift hours

• onboarding new students smoothly

• creating WhatsApp groups + sending structured messages

• matching students to tutors and ensuring lessons run without disruption

• communicating professionally with parents about day-to-day learning, homework, and lesson logistics



This role is ideal for someone who is organised, calm under pressure, confident communicating with parents, and willing to learn our systems quickly.



Core Responsibilities

1) WhatsApp Monitoring & Student Onboarding (Daily)



Monitor multiple WhatsApp inboxes during your shift (fast response times expected)



Save new leads/students as contacts correctly (naming conventions provided)



Create WhatsApp groups for new students (e.g., Student + Parent + Tutor + Admin)



Send structured onboarding messages (templates provided)



Follow up systematically (no missed conversations)



Track inflow of students/leads and ensure every enquiry progresses to the next step



2) Tutor–Student Matching & Lesson Coordination (Daily)



Pair students with the right tutor (based on subject, year group, exam board, availability)



Ensure everyone has the correct Zoom/lesson link and lesson timings



Confirm attendance and handle reschedules smoothly



Keep a daily log of lessons booked, completed, missed, and rescheduled



Escalate urgent issues to the director/operations lead quickly and clearly



3) Parent Communication & Student Success Support



Communicate with parents professionally about:



homework submission



missed lessons



exam timelines



progress updates (based on tutor feedback)



Remind students to complete homework / assessments



Occasionally join/check Zoom sessions briefly (when required) to ensure students are engaged and following the process



Support quality assurance standards (consistent messaging, accurate info, calm tone)



4) Optional Growth Duties (As You Prove Yourself)



Appointment setting (booking parent calls)



Sales support (follow-up sequences, warm leads)



Setter role ? Closer role (high-ticket sales) with performance-based earning potential



Light admin support on Zoom logins / scheduling systems (introduced later)



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Excellent English communication (written + spoken)



Clear, neutral/British-sounding spoken English (parents must find your speech easy to understand)



Confident speaking to UK parents (polite, calm, professional)



Strong organisation: ability to track multiple students/tutors without errors



Comfortable working in a fast-moving WhatsApp-based operations environment



Familiarity with UK education is a major advantage:



GCSE / IGCSE / A-Level awareness (exam boards, grade goals, terminology)



Willingness to learn systems and follow structured processes



Tech Setup Required



Desktop/laptop with WhatsApp Web/Desktop running during shift



Smartphone with WhatsApp installed (for mobility/backup monitoring)



Stable high-speed internet + quiet, professional workspace



Strong typing speed + ability to manage multiple chats efficiently



Basic familiarity with Google Sheets/Docs for logging and tracking



Working Hours



UK business-hours coverage preferred (approx. 9am–5pm UK time), 8-hour shifts



Additional light monitoring may be required occasionally (to be agreed in advance)



Compensation & Growth Path



Fixed salary initially (based on experience and performance in trial period)



Clear progression route:



Student Success Manager / Ops VA



Setter (appointment booking + lead handling)



Closer (high-ticket enrolments) ? higher earning potential



The more responsibility you can handle reliably, the faster your pay and role can grow



What “Good” Looks Like in This Role



No missed leads, no missed follow-ups



Groups set up correctly, messages sent cleanly, parents feel supported



Tutor–student pairing is smooth and errors are rare



You sound confident, warm, professional — parents trust you



You protect the learning experience through consistent communication and structure



How to Apply (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must send:



CV/Resume (not necessary)



A YouTube video link (not a file upload) — 2 to 4 minutes, unlisted is fine (MUST)

or another suitable link.



Your YouTube video must cover:



Who you are and your relevant experience (especially education/parent-facing work)



Why you’re a strong fit for a premium tutoring company



A short roleplay: how you would speak to a parent about homework not being submitted



Your availability and tech setup (desktop + phone WhatsApp)



Applications without a YouTube link will be rejected.



Important



DO NOT CALL — applications via message only



This role requires professionalism, speed, and reliability



If you’re organised, presentable, parent-friendly, and serious about building a long-term career in education operations — apply now.

title: YouTube Channel Manager (Christian Music / AI Content Creation)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and creative YouTube Channel Manager to help revive and scale an established Christian music channel: YouTube 
 







This is NOT a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can take full ownership of content production and help grow the channel to 1 million subscribers and beyond.

________________________________________

About the Channel

• Niche: Christian / Scripture-based music

• Current Subscribers: 42,000+

• Previously generated: $3,000/month in ad revenue

• Goal: Reach 1M subscribers and $20,000/month revenue

The channel has been inactive for several months and needs a strong, consistent content system to revive and scale.

________________________________________

Your Role (Full Ownership)

You will be responsible for end-to-end content creation and publishing.

Your responsibilities include:

Music Creation

• Scripture Based Lyrics using AI LLMs (ChatGPT, Grok,ect)

• Generate scripture-based songs using AI tools (e.g., Suno.ai)

• Ensure emotional, engaging, and spiritually aligned content

________________________________________

Video Production

• Create music videos using AI visuals (MidJourney or similar)

• Edit full videos (CapCut or similar tools)

• Produce:

o 1 short “banger” songs per week (3–5 mins)

o 2 gospel playlist video per week (30–60 mins)

________________________________________

YouTube Optimization

• Write:

o High-CTR titles

o SEO-optimized descriptions

o Tags & keywords

• Design engaging thumbnails (Canva or Photoshop)

________________________________________

Upload & Scheduling

• Upload 3 videos per week

• Follow a consistent posting schedule

________________________________________

Performance Tracking

• Monitor video performance

• Suggest improvements based on results

________________________________________

Content Requirements

• 12 videos per month (minimum)

• Mix of:

o Emotional scripture songs

o Worship compilations (for watch time)

________________________________________

Required Skills

MUST HAVE:

• Experience managing or growing YouTube channels

• Strong English writing skills (VERY important)

• Experience with:

o AI tools (Suno.ai, MidJourney, ChatGPT, etc.)

o Video editing (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

o Thumbnail design

________________________________________

BONUS (Preferred but not required):

• Experience in Christian / faith-based content

• Understanding of YouTube algorithm & CTR optimization

• Music sense (melody, emotion, pacing)

________________________________________

Compensation

   Base Pay (Fortnightly)

• $250 USD every 2 weeks

________________________________________

Performance Bonuses

A. Short-Term Bonus (30 Days)

• $10 ? 5K views 

• $25 ? 10K views 

• $50 ? 25K views 

Paid once per video, within 30 days



B. VIRAL BONUS (90 Days Window)

Add this for motivation:

• $100 ? 100K views (within 90 days) 

• $250 ? 500K views (within 90 days)

________________________________________

Revenue Share

• 5% of YouTube AdSense revenue

• Paid monthly (based on previous month earnings)

________________________________________

Growth Opportunity

As the channel grows, your salary and revenue share will increase significantly.

This role can grow into a long-term Channel Manager position with higher income and responsibility.

________________________________________

Important Notes

• You must be reliable and consistent

• You must be able to work independently

• You will have creative freedom, but final approval will be required

________________________________________

TEST TASK (REQUIRED)

To apply, please complete this task:

Create 1 YouTube video concept based on the Bible verse – John 3:16:

• Give a High CTR Title

• Short lyrics and song (1 verse + chorus)

• Less than 1min video that goes with song

• Thumbnail idea

• Description (short)

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please include:

1. Your portfolio or past work (YouTube channels, videos, etc.)

2. List of tools you are familiar with

3. Your experience with AI content creation

4. Your favourite Christian song (optional but preferred)

5. Your completed test task

6. Finaly, give a feedback about the channel 
 on what you would improve or focus more on if any.

________________________________________

Final Note

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the channel long-term, not just complete tasks.

If you are passionate about faith-based content, music, and YouTube growth, this is a great opportunity.

title: Accounts Admin
description:
Yaran Property Group (
) is a property development and investment company established in 1996. To date the company has completed over 1100 dwellings across 60+ projects in WA focusing on affordable housing, and housing for those with a disability.



The mission of Yaran is “to be a blessing to others through housing which is affordable, fit-for-purpose, and environmentally conscious”.



Position Overview

The Accounts Admin is responsible for supporting the accounts team in managing day-to-day accounting functions for property development projects. This role ensures accurate processing of invoices, monitoring of project expenses, reconciliation of accounts, and assisting with financial reporting. The ideal candidate is highly organised, detail-oriented, and experienced in accounting systems such as Xero and MS Office.



Duties and Responsibilities

-Process supplier invoices and ensure correct coding to projects and cost centers.

-Prepare and process payment runs.

-Liaise with contractors and suppliers regarding payment queries.

-Raise invoices for development-related services, project contributions, or other billings.

-Perform regular bank reconciliations.

-Maintain accurate records of loan drawdowns and repayments where required.

-Assist in tracking development project costs.

-Support preparation of cost reports for project managers.

-Assist in month-end closing procedures including account reconciliations.

-Prepare financial reports and summaries as requested by the finance team.

-Support audit preparation and provide documentation when required.

-Assist the finance team in preparing documentation and reconciliations required for End of Financial Year (EOFY) processes.

-Support preparation of reports and schedules required by external accountants or auditors.



Skills and Experience:

-Previous experience in accounts administration (preferably within property development or construction).

-Familiarity with Australian accounting practices (preferred but not required).

-Experience with Xero (preferred but not required)

-Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

-Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.



Qualifications:

-Degree in Accounting or Finance.

-Must have a reliable personal laptop or desktop computer suitable for remote work, with stable internet connection and the ability to install and run required accounting and communication software.

-Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other MS Office applications.



Employment Salary and Benefits:

-Immediate Start

-Full-time, Monday-Friday 9:00AM to 5:30PM PH Time

-Salary: $230 AUD per week

-Benefit: 13th Month Pay

 your cover letter and resume to:

title: Virtual Assistant - CRM Lead Manager & Appointment Setter
description:
SoCal Solar Check is a solar sales operation serving homeowners across California. We help homeowners with older solar systems upgrade to modern, high-performance systems through various financiers. Our primary one is the largest residential solar company in the US. Our lead generation is largely automated, and we're looking for a sharp, reliable virtual assistant to manage the CRM and keep the pipeline moving.



You'll be the person inside our CRM making sure no lead falls through the cracks. Our outbound SMS system generates hundreds of replies per week. Your job is to monitor those replies, classify them, engage the interested ones, and book them on the calendar so our closers can get on the phone. You'll also be responsible for enrolling fresh leads into our outbound sequences daily to keep the top of the funnel flowing.

This is not a phone sales role. You will not be making calls or closing deals. You're the operational backbone that keeps the machine running.



What You'll Do



Monitor inbound SMS replies in Close CRM and classify them using our Reply Legend (provided)

Respond to interested leads via SMS and book qualified appointments on Google Calendar

Enroll 200–250 new leads per day into outbound SMS Workflows in Close CRM

Keep lead statuses updated and accurate across the pipeline

Run a daily DNC compliance audit to ensure opt-out requests are properly handled

Post daily start-of-day and end-of-day updates in Slack

Flag anything unclear or outside your training to the team lead via Slack

Maintain lead data quality through weekly audits



Tools You'll Use



Close CRM (this is where you'll spend 90% of your time)

Slack (internal communication)

Google Calendar (appointment booking)



That's it. We keep the tech stack lean. Full training and SOPs are provided, including video walkthroughs.

What We're Looking For



Excellent written English — you'll be texting homeowners in Southern California, so your messages need to sound natural and conversational

Experience with a CRM (Close, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) — you don't need to know Close specifically, but you should be comfortable navigating a CRM

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

Detail-oriented — lead statuses, compliance, and data accuracy matter here

Responsive communicator — 15-minute max response time on Slack during working hours

Self-starter who can follow documented processes without needing constant oversight

Available to work 11 AM – 7 PM Pacific Time, Monday through Friday



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience in solar, real estate, or home services industries

Familiarity with Close CRM specifically

Experience with SMS-based lead engagement or appointment setting



What We Provide



Full onboarding plan with a 30-day ramp-up structure

Detailed SOPs for every task — nothing is left to guesswork

Loom video walkthroughs of every core process

Weekly check-ins during your first month, then biweekly as you ramp

Paid US holidays (6 per year)

Performance-based pay raises at the 60-day and 90-day review milestones

A clear, defined role with room to grow as the operation scales



To Apply

Send a short message (3–5 sentences) introducing yourself and answering these three questions:



Have you worked in a CRM before? If so, which one and what did you do in it?

What hours are you currently available in US Pacific Time?

This role starts at $6 - 9/hr based on experience, with performance-based raises at 60-90 days. Are you comfortable with this starting rate?



Applications that don't answer these questions will not be reviewed.

title: Happy Call Team(CS)
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Happy Call Team (CS) is responsible for ensuring customers have a positive experience with Haulla service by analyzing feedback, identifying improvements, and implementing effective solutions. Core responsibilities will include:



- Customer Satisfaction & Retention: Conduct proactive satisfaction checks ("Happy Calls") to verify customer satisfaction and identify potential friction points before they escalate into churn.

- AR & Collection Management: Proactively manage and collect outstanding AR (Accounts Receivable) to improve overall collection rates while minimizing customer attrition.

- Churn Mitigation & Recovery: Identify churn risks during the collection process and implement personalized recovery plans for long-term past-due accounts to encourage service re-entry and long-term loyalty.

- Billing Dispute Resolution: Serve as the primary point of contact for customer billing disputes and grievances, providing swift and effective resolutions that restore service confidence.

- Trust Rebuilding: Leverage positive collection experiences as an opportunity to rebuild trust and enhance the overall customer lifecycle value.



What We're Looking for

- This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus





Good To Have

- Experience in Collection Agency(Over 3+ years)

- Experience in Call Center

- Language Skills: Proficiency in Spanish is not required but is considered a significant advantage.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation



- Base salary plus performance-based bonuses

- Total earning potential: Php 60,000–130,000+/month

- Performance-based commission structure



Interested applicants may apply through the following Google form :

title: Warm Lead Caller / Appointment Setter – US Hours + Weekends | Base + Commission
description:
We’re hiring a Warm Lead Caller / Appointment Setter to handle leads who have already shown interest.



These aren’t cold calls.

These are people who opted in, booked, or are ready to book — and your job is to move fast, qualify properly, and make sure they show up.



This role is about speed, consistency, and follow-through.



If you’re reliable, responsive, and good on the phone, you’ll do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Call new leads as soon as they come in

Qualify leads and book them into the calendar if not already booked

Confirm appointments and ensure clarity before the call

Call leads again ~1 hour before their scheduled appointment to increase show-up rates

Track all activity and notes inside the CRM

Maintain consistent availability during US time zones + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

Warm, high-intent leads — no random cold lists

Scripts, CRM, and process fully provided

A clear, repeatable system no guesswork



You’re a Good Fit If You:

Speak fluent, confident English

Have experience in appointment setting, warm calling, or sales (preferred)

Are responsive and can act quickly when leads come in

Are comfortable working US hours and weekends

Are organized and consistent with follow-ups

Understand that speed = results in this role



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 minutes) answering:



Your experience with calling or appointment setting

Your availability for US hours + weekends

How quickly you typically respond to new leads



We’re hiring one caller/setter for this role.

If you’re fast, reliable, and know how to handle warm leads properly — apply now.



- Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Meta Ads Expert for E-Commerce business.
description:
We're hiring a Meta Ads specialist who actually knows how to test, optimise, and scale — not just run ads and hope for the best.



We are a fast-growing Australian e-commerce brand selling premium physical products. We've been running Meta Ads for years but we're done with people who set and forget. We want someone obsessed with performance, testing, and results.

What you'll be doing



• Run structured creative and copy testing every single month — no exceptions

• Build and manage full-funnel campaigns — prospecting, retargeting, remarketing

• Kill losers fast, scale winners hard

• Reduce cost per result while maintaining or growing volume

• Brief or produce ad creatives — video, image, carousel

• Report weekly on actual business outcomes — purchases, ROAS, CPR

• Own audience strategy — broad, interest, lookalike, exclusions

What we need from you



• 5+ years running Meta Ads for e-commerce brands specifically

• Experience with high ticket physical products ($100+ AOV)

• Managed accounts spending $20k+ per month

• Proven track record of reducing cost per purchase over time

• Strong understanding of creative strategy — not just the technical side

• Can show real results from real accounts — not just pretty case studies

• Comfortable with CBO, ABO, Advantage+ and when to use each

• Understands post-iOS14 attribution and works around it



This role is NOT for you if



• You set up campaigns and check them once a month

• You can't show us actual Ads Manager screenshots with real results

• You're a generalist digital marketer who "also does Meta Ads"

• You report on reach and impressions instead of purchases and ROAS

title: STR Support

Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned



Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses



This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW.



Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential.



You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management.



What You’ll Be Doing

, direct bookings

Operations & Coordination

Admin, Reporting & Growth

- Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup

- Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.)

- Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards

- Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals

- Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations



As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

- Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners

- Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments

- Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused

- Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged

- Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly



Skills & Experience



Required:

- Excellent spoken & written English

- Stable internet connection

- Confident handling phone calls

- Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero

- Familiarity with Airbnb, 
, and direct booking sites

- Strong organisational & multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)



Preferred (but not mandatory)



- 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support

- Experience working with Australian clients

- Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors



We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset.



Tools You’ll Use

Core Systems:

- Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana

- Comms & Support:

- Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp

- Automation & Docs:

- ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress



Bonus Tools:

- PriceLabs or other pricing platforms





What You’ll Get:



- Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned)

- Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts

- You’ll work one or both weekend days

- Always two consecutive days off each week

- Paid training & onboarding

- Direct mentorship from leadership

- Long-term career growth in a scaling business

- Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations



A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

title: Loan Data Analyst
description:
About the Role

We are an Australian-based private  lender looking for a detail-oriented Loan Data Analyst to support our credit team. You will play a key role in preparing and organising customer financial data to assist our assessors in making responsible lending decisions.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Review and organise customer bank transaction data (last 90 days)

 • Categorise income, expenses, and liabilities accurately

 • Identify key financial behaviours (e.g. gambling, BNPL, payday loans, overdrafts)

 • Prepare clean, structured summaries for credit assessors

 • Flag inconsistencies or missing information for further review

 • Maintain strict data handling and privacy standards at all times



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Experience working with bank transaction data, financial data, or lending/fintech platforms

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to spot patterns or anomalies

 • Experience categorising transactions (manual or via tools)

 • Understanding of personal finance (income vs expenses, liabilities, etc.)

 • Ability to follow structured processes and compliance requirements

 • Excellent English communication skills



?



Important – Privacy & Data Handling

You will be working with sensitive financial data. All work must be completed in line with strict privacy and confidentiality requirements. No customer data is to be stored, shared, or used outside of the platform.



?



Application Requirement (Important)

As part of your application, please provide examples of how you have previously categorised bank transaction data, ensuring:

 • All personal information is removed or anonymised

 • No real customer names, account numbers, or identifiable details are included

 • Examples clearly show how transactions were grouped (e.g. income, rent, utilities, gambling, BNPL, discretionary spending)



?



Why Join Us?

 • Work with a fast-growing Australian lender

 • Be part of a scalable, tech-driven lending model

 • Long-term opportunity with growth potential

beehiiv

 and Zapier

HTML

Clear file naming, version control, and organized folders are mandatory.

You flag issues early and propose solutions.



Trial assignment - Live on camera



Final candidates will complete a paid test that includes:



Editing a newsletter draft 

Building a simple beehiiv flow from a short spec (tagging + segmentation + sequence)

Repurposing one LinkedIn post into 2–3 platform-native variants



To apply share your linkedin, work samples as appicable and availability for a live test

title: Customer Service Overflow
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Overflow

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



Maid My Day is a Cleaning Company operating across Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane and Canberra within Australia. We service the Australian Aged Care Industry by having our workers provide cleaning services for the elderly who still live in their homes. We have been operating for 16 years and we have approximately 250 cleaners working for our company.



- The Role -

Due to recent growth, we are now looking for a passionate Customer Service Representative to manage the overflow tasks on our busy customer service desk. We currently have 24 full-time VA's who work from their homes in the Philippines. We have an experienced full-time Customer Service team and your role would be to support them by looking after the following functions;

1. Attendance monitoring - ensure all cleaners are logged in on their shift and have started on time

  - Coordinate with the aged care, client or the team any concerns with the attendances

2. SMS monitoring and real-time processing of concerns. 

3. Answer and manage the overflow of calls coming into our Customer Service desk

Please note: This involves a high influx of outbound calls,
s and SMS 





- Skills and Experience Required -

Minimum 2 years of experience working on an English-speaking customer service desk managing calls,
s and SMS

Organised and able to manage time effectively

Detail-oriented but also capable of multi-tasking

Positive and helpful attitude, especially when dealing with cleaners and clients

Comfortable in a tight-knit team environment

Willing to take responsibility for own work and be accountable for KPIs

Experience with cloud-based software is beneficial to hit the ground running





- Requirements -

Reliable Internet Connection

Noise Cancelling Headphones

Quite place to work with no distractions

Reliable backup 





- What we offer -

Compensation: starts at $665AUD with possible growth after 3 months & KPI incentives

Opportunity to work remotely.

Work alongside fellow Filipino tea
mbers who will support you as you grow in your role.

One-on-one training will be provided by a Philippines-based employee.

Please
 Chelle at 
 with:

title: AI / Technical Automation Specialist
description:
Technical Automation Specialist — Remote

About the role

We're a fast-moving group of companies operating across solar sales, recruitment, and lead generation — and we're looking for a sharp Technical Automation Specialist to own our automation stack. You'll work directly with the founders to build, maintain, and scale workflows across our CRM, outreach, lead pipelines, and internal systems. This is a hands-on builder role — not a consultant.

What you'll be doing



Build and manage automation workflows in Make (Integromat), n8n, and Zapier

Connect and integrate third-party tools via REST APIs, webhooks, and native connectors

Manage and troubleshoot CRM integrations (Go High Level, 
, Airtable)

Set up lead enrichment pipelines,
 automation sequences, and booking flows

Debug failing scenarios, maintain error handling, and monitor automation health

Support ad platform data flows — Meta, Google, and TikTok pixel/CAPI event routing

Document all workflows clearly so they can be handed off or replicated

Make (Integromat)

n8n

Zapier

REST APIs & webhooks

JSON / data mapping

CRM integrations

 · Basic JS or Python · OpenAI API

Who you are

You've worked in a startup or small team and are comfortable with fast iteration



How to apply

Send a short Loom or written overview of an automation you've built — what it did, what tools you used, and why.

title: Sales Executive $3.00 per hour WITH COMMISSION
description:
About Us

We are a premier health and safety training centre in Northern Ireland and the UK, dedicated to delivering accredited courses and compliance solutions. We are seeking a dynamic, multi-skilled Sales Executive to drive business growth. This is not a traditional sales role—we need a proactive, versatile individual who can combine sales tenacity with creative design capability to engage clients and el-evate our brand presence.



The Role

This is a high-autonomy, work-from-home position requiring a results-driven pro-fessional who can manage the full sales cycle while also producing high-quality visual marketing materials. You will be responsible for generating leads, convert-ing enquiries into bookings, nurturing client relationships, and creating the sales collateral that supports these efforts. The ideal candidate thrives on variety, takes ownership, and is fully committed to a single role with no outside work.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development

• Lead Generation: Proactively identify and pursue new business oppor-tunities across Northern Ireland and the UK, targeting businesses requiring health and safety training, auditing, and consultancy services.

• Consultative Selling: Engage with prospective clients via phone,
, video conferencing, and occasional meetings to understand their training needs and recommend tailored solutions.

• Pipeline Management: Manage the full sales cycle from initial contact to closing, maintaining accurate records within the CRM system.

• Client Retention: Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with existing clients, identifying opportunities for upselling and repeat business.

• Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed monthly and quar-terly sales targets.

• Enquiry Conversion: Respond promptly and professionally to inbound enquiries, converting them into confirmed course bookings and corporate contracts.



Graphic Design & Marketing Collateral

• Sales Collateral Creation: Design professional, branded sales materials including pitch decks, proposal templates, course brochures, and one-pagers using tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite.

• Digital Content: Create visually engaging content for
 campaigns, social media (LinkedIn,
), and the company website to support lead generation and brand awareness.

• Presentation Design: Develop compelling presentations for client meetings, webinars, and corporate pitches that effectively communicate the value of company’s services.

• Brand Consistency: Ensure all designs adhere to the company’s brand guidelines and maintain a high standard of professionalism.



Client Coordination & Administration

• Course Bookings: Liaise with the operations team to coordinate course schedules and ensure seamless booking experiences for corporate clients.

• Proposal & Quote Preparation: Prepare accurate, professional quotes and proposals tailored to client requirements.

• Post-Sale Follow-Up: Conduct post-training follow-ups with clients to gather feedback, secure testimonials, and identify future opportunities.

• CRM Management: Maintain meticulous records of all sales activities, client interactions, and opportunities within the CRM system.



Process & Self-Management

• Sales Process Improvement: Contribute to the development and re-finement of sales processes, scripts, and workflows to improve efficiency and conversion rates.

• Autonomous Working: Manage your own schedule effectively, demon-strating self-discipline, organisation, and the ability to work independently in a home-based environment.

• Ad-Hoc Tasks: Adapt to additional duties as required, supporting the wider team to meet business objectives.



Person Specification

Essential Criteria

• Sales Experience: Proven experience in a sales or business development role, ideally within B2B services, training, or professional services sectors. Demonstrable track record of meeting or exceeding targets.

• Graphic Design Proficiency: Demonstrable ability to create profes-sional marketing and sales collateral using design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign), or equivalent. A portfolio or examples of work will be required.

• Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present persuasively, negotiate effectively, and build rapport with decision-makers.

• Computer Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 (Outlook, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams), CRM software, and digital communi-cation tools.

• Organisational Ability: Excellent time management and organisation-al skills, with the ability to juggle multiple leads, tasks, and deadlines with-out supervision.

• Resilience & Drive: Self-motivated, resilient, and target-driven, with a proactive approach to problem-solving and business development.

• Integrity: Honest, diligent, and trustworthy, with a commitment to rep-resenting the company professionally at all times.

• Home Working Capability: A quiet, dedicated home workspace with reliable high-speed internet access.



Desirable Criteria

• Previous experience selling health and safety training, auditing, or consul-tancy services.

• Knowledge of the corporate training requirements.

• Experience with
 marketing platforms and social media manage-ment tools.

• Basic knowledge of health and safety legislation to facilitate informed cli-ent conversations.



Terms of Employment

• Working Arrangements: This is a fully remote, work-from-home posi-tion. 

• Exclusivity: This is a full-time role requiring complete commitment. No other concurrent employment, freelance work, or external business activities are permitted.

• Hours: Standard office hours, Monday to Friday. Flexibility may be required occasionally to attend client meetings or respond to business needs out-side core hours.

• Equipment: The successful candidate must have their own computer (with sufficient capability for design software) and reliable high-speed in-ternet connection.



How to Apply

Please submit your CV, a cover letter detailing your sales achievements and de-sign capabilities, and examples of your design work (portfolio, PDF samples, or links to materials you have created). Applications without design examples will not be considered.
