title: Operations Administrator
description:
About Us

We are a leading health and safety training centre based in Northern Ireland. We are committed to delivering high-quality training and compliance solutions. To support our growing operations, we are seeking a dedicated and versatile Opera-tions Administrator to join our team remotely.



The Role

We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, and honest individual to oversee the day-to-day operations of our training centre. This is a multifaceted role requir-ing a unique blend of administrative rigour, creative design capability, financial accuracy, and process improvement skills. The successful candidate must be computer proficient and capable of working independently in a home-based en-vironment, with no other outside employment.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Administration

• Oversee the day-to-day operational workflow of the training centre, ensur-ing all administrative processes run smoothly and efficiently.

• Manage course scheduling, delegate bookings, and trainer coordination.

• Act as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing excellent cus-tomer service via phone,
, and digital platforms.

• Maintain accurate and organised digital filing systems, ensuring all records are compliant with data protection regulations (UK GDPR).

• Prepare and issue course certificates, delegate materials, and pre-course documentation.

Graphics & Design

• Create and edit professional marketing materials, including course bro-chures, social media graphics, presentation templates, and client-facing documents.

• Design internal process documents, flowcharts, and visual aids to support training delivery and operational procedures.

• Ensure all design work aligns with the company’s brand identity and main-tains a high standard of professionalism.



Bookkeeping & Finance Support

• Perform basic bookkeeping tasks, including processing invoices, tracking payments, and reconciling accounts using accounting software.

• Assist with credit control, following up on outstanding payments in a pro-fessional and timely manner.

• Prepare financial summaries and reports for management as required.



Process Improvement & Automation

• Analyse existing administrative and operational processes to identify inef-ficiencies.

• Build, document, and implement new workflows and automated systems to streamline repetitive tasks.

• Leverage technology to reduce manual data entry, improve accuracy, and enhance overall productivity.



General & Ad-Hoc Duties

• Provide general clerical support, including data entry, report generation, and minute-taking for meetings.

• Adapt to additional tasks as required, supporting the wider team to meet business objectives.

• Proactively identify and resolve operational issues before they escalate.



Person Specification

Essential Criteria

• Computer Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 (Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams, PowerPoint) and Google Workspace. Ability to quickly learn and master new software and CRMs.

• Graphic Design: Proven experience with design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/InDesign), or similar to produce profes-sional marketing and internal materials.

• Bookkeeping: Experience with basic bookkeeping principles and famili-arity with accounting software such as QuickBooks, or Sage).

• Process Improvement: Demonstrable experience in building workflows and automating processes 

• Organisational Skills: Exceptional ability to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and maintain attention to detail in a fast-paced environ-ment.

• Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional and courteous manner.

• Integrity: Must be honest, diligent, and trustworthy, with the ability to handle sensitive financial and client data responsibly.

• Home Working Capability: A quiet, dedicated home workspace with reliable high-speed internet access.



Desirable Criteria

• Previous experience working in a health and safety training environment or similar professional services sector.

• Qualification in bookkeeping or business administration.

• Knowledge of various softwares and tools 



Terms of Employment

• Working Arrangements: This is a fully remote, work-from-home posi-tion.

• Exclusivity: This is a full-time role. Due to the nature and demands of the position, no other concurrent employment or freelance work is permitted. Full commitment and focus on operations are required.

• Hours: Standard office hours, Monday to Friday. Flexibility may be required occasionally to meet business needs.

• Equipment: The successful candidate must have their own computer and reliable high-speed internet connection. Specific software licenses may be provided by the company.



How to Apply

Please submit your CV and a cover letter detailing your experience in operations, design, bookkeeping, and process workflows. Include examples of design work (portfolio or links) if available.

title: Virtual Assistant: Automation Support
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing influencer marketing agency that connects YouTube creators with brand sponsorships in the tech, gaming, and entertainment industry. 



This is not a typical VA role. You will not be doing one repetitive task. Every day looks different. You might run an automation workflow in the morning, audit an
 inbox before lunch, research YouTube creators in the afternoon, update a large dataset, and draft a client
 before end of day.



We are a small team where everyone delivers. We are looking for someone who works hard, is proactive, reliable, resilient, and delivers on time. If that sounds like you, you are welcome to apply.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



This is not a typical VA role. Every day looks different. In a single day, you might:



- Run automation workflows in n8n and Claude Code (30%)

- Manage large-scale databases in Google Sheets (25%)

- Launch and monitor cold
 and sponsorship outreach campaigns (20%)

- Research YouTube creators using AI tools like Claude and Perplexity (15%)

- Communicate with clients, creators, and agencies. Keep files and systems organized (10%)



You will be one of the key people making things happen - not a number at a big company.





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 3-5 years work experience (this cannot be your first job)

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF, pivot tables, data validation)

- Experience with at least one automation tool (n8n, Zapier, or similar)

- Tech savvy - picks up new tools quickly without hand-holding

- Strong written and spoken English

- Handles multiple types of tasks every day without getting overwhelmed

- Extremely organized, diligent, and reliable

- Delivers on time. Communicates before problems become problems.





WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



- If you have never used any automation tool

- If you prefer doing one type of task all day

- If you are looking for a relaxed, low-pressure role

- If you need to be spoon-fed instructions for everything

- If you struggle with deadlines

- If you are not proactive





WHAT WE OFFER



- ~$500/month, negotiable based on experience

- Work directly with founders on real campaigns with real creators and brands

- Learn n8n, Claude Code, AI tools, and influencer marketing operations

- Growth path to Operations Manager as we scale

- Performance reviews every 3 months



Work setup: 8-10 hrs/day, Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm Dubai time (UTC+4). Fully remote. Time tracking via Toggl. Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power required.





HOW TO APPLY



>>  



Do not use AI to write your answers. We check. AI-written applications are disqualified.

title: Virtual Customer Experience Officer (Receptionist, Admin + Project Work)
description:
Virtual Receptionist / Administrator

Full-time (20-30hrs/week) | $5-10 AUD/hour | Sydney AEST Hours | Long-Term Role



We are hiring a confident, caring, and detail-oriented Virtual Customer Experience Officer to support two thriving Australian Businesses:



Carte Blanche Hair – a luxury salon delivering exquisite, high-touch experiences for self-expressed clients

Fixio Physiotherapy – a progressive clinic offering intelligent, empathetic care with clinical excellence



We are seeking a Virtual Receptionist / Administrator to become a long-term part of our operations team. This is a key role where you are the front line; the voice, the organiser, and the calm hand that ensures our client journey is flawless. You will support our in-salon and in-clinic teams by keeping bookings smooth, clients, informed, and back-end tasks running efficiently.

It is best suited to someone who values structure, consistency, and professional growth in a stable remote role. It also requires uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours so we prefer applicants with minimal personal obligations during work time.



About the Role



This position combines front-line receptionist duties, administrative support, and light project management. You will be a key point of contact for our clients and an essential support for our internal team. You will be working closely with the business owners and 1–2 other admin tea
mbers in a professional, fast-paced environment.



3 Key Components of the Role



1. Receptionist Duties

You will be responsible for managing two phone lines throughout your shift.

Answering and making calls using DialPad

Booking and managing appointments via Fresha (Salon) and Cliniko (Clinic)

Responding to phone, SMS, and
 enquiries with clarity, warmth, and confidence

Guiding clients toward the correct services and practitioners

Maintaining a calm, professional tone at all times



2. Administration

Inbox and
 management

Calendar coordination and scheduling

Data entry and record management

Strong daily use of Google Workspace

Team communication via Slack, WhatsApp, and Outlook

Handling sensitive client and HR information with discretion and confidentiality

Reporting directly to the business owners



3. Project Management (Ad Hoc)

Supporting operational projects as needed

Creating or improving internal resources

Identifying efficiencies in workflows and systems

Assisting with the creation of policies and procedures

Taking initiative and thinking critically without constant supervision



We are looking for someone who is:



A confident and kind communicator with a clear phone manner

Experienced in reception, admin, or client-facing roles (bonus if in hair/healthcare)

Fluent in English with strong conversational, writing, and spelling skills

Highly competent with Google workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, etc.)

Comfortable learning and navigating systems like Fresha, Cliniko, Cliniqflows, and DialPad

Emotionally Intelligent, organised, and able to multitask

A proactive team player who values both excellence and warmth



Work Requirements



Must be available during Sydney (AEST) Timezone. You will need to be available for ALL of the hours below:

Monday to Friday at 8:00am – 6:00pm AEST

Saturday at 8:00am – 3:00pm AEST

Starting at 20 hours per week (with potential to grow to 30+ hours per week)

Flexibility to cover other shifts when required

Stable internet connection (backup preferred)

Reliable power supply

Professional, quiet work setup

Ability to remain online and responsive throughout the shift



What We Offer



Stable, long-term remote role

Clear expectations and structured workflows

Supportive team environment

Work with premium, established Australian brands

Potential for career growth into a leadership/practice manager role encompassing invoicing, billing, additional project work, and training of other tea
mbers.

Contract & Compensation

Rate: $5-10 AUD/hour (This will depend on experience and proficiency in required skills)

Initial 3-month Trial Contract

Role begins within 1 week with training to start

Long-term role with increasing hours and potential to grow full-time



**Please note that no other work is permitted during rostered hours due to workload. This role requires consistent daily presence and uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours. Please apply only if this aligns with your current lifestyle and work environment.**



How to Apply



All applications must be submitted exclusively via our Google Form. We do not accept applications or CVs through OnlineJobs.ph messages.

To apply:

Carefully read the role description to ensure it aligns with your availability, work environment, and long-term goals

Complete the Google Form in full, providing clear and thoughtful responses

Access the Link Here:

Only applications submitted through the Google Form will be reviewed. Incomplete or rushed responses will not be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage, which may include a trial task.

title: Amazon PPC Manager – E-commerce Growth & ROI Specialist
description:
Role Overview: We are seeking a highly analytical, aggressive, and results-driven Amazon PPC Manager to take full ownership of our Amazon advertising strategy and execution. In this role, you will not just be "managing campaigns"—you will be the driving force behind our profitability, revenue scaling, and market share domination.



We are looking for a strategic expert with a proven, verifiable track record of scaling Amazon brands while lowering Total Advertising Cost of Sales (TACoS) and maximizing Return on Ad Spend (ROAS). If you are a problem-solver who thrives on data, scaling budgets profitably, and measurable outcomes, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities (What You Will Accomplish):



Drive Scalable Revenue Growth: Architect, launch, and aggressively manage full-funnel Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display, and Amazon DSP) to maximize daily sales velocity and net profit.

Relentless Optimization: Continuously audit and optimize bids, search terms, and targeting strategies to achieve aggressive target ACoS and TACoS. You will cut wasted spend with precision negative keywords while scaling winning campaigns.

Keyword & Competitor Domination: Execute deep-dive keyword research and competitor analysis to identify profitable gaps, win top-of-search placements, and aggressively defend our brand share against competitors.

Strategic Campaign Architecture: Build and refine advanced campaign structures (e.g., search term isolation, auto-campaign harvesting, and custom budget allocation based on product life cycles and profitability).

Actionable Reporting & Forecasting: Go beyond basic metrics. Deliver weekly performance insights detailing critical KPIs (Spend, Sales, ROAS, ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR) accompanied by proactive action plans and growth forecasts.

Inventory Alignment: Collaborate closely with the inventory team to align ad spend with stock levels—aggressively pushing overstock inventory while throttling or pausing campaigns to avoid stockouts on top-sellers.

A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): Continuously test ad copy, custom creative assets, video ads, and storefront traffic to improve Click-Through Rates (CTR) and overall Conversion Rates (CVR).





Required Skills & Qualifications:



Experience: Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience independently managing high-volume Amazon PPC budgets ($50k - $100k+/month spend).

Proven Track Record: Tangible history of scaling accounts while maintaining or improving profitability targets. (Note: You will be required to share your best case studies).

Technical Mastery: Deep, up-to-date understanding of the Amazon A9 Ranking Algorithm, Amazon Campaign Manager, Brand Analytics, and advanced targeting features.

Strategic Mindset: Proactive problem-solver who does not wait to be told what to do. You stay ahead of Amazon’s frequent platform updates and terms of service changes.





Performance KPIs (How Your Success Will Be Measured):



Overall Revenue Growth at the brand level.

Strict adherence to benchmark TACoS (Total ACoS) and target ROAS.

Increased organic ranking velocity driven by targeted PPC conversions.

Reduction of wasted ad spend (Zero-sale search term mitigation).





Compensation & Perks:



Pay Rate: HIGHLY NEGOTIABLE. We believe in paying top dollar for top talent. Compensation will be tailored to your experience, direct track record, and the results you can deliver. We are open to a strong base salary, performance-based profit-sharing, or commission structures for the right A-player.



Fully remote work environment with flexible working hours.



Opportunity to lead growth for an ambitious and rapidly expanding brand.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter. With your application, you must include your best case studies detailing your past performance (e.g., how you successfully scaled an account, improved ROAS/ACoS, and the specific strategies you implemented to achieve those results).

title: Virtual Assistant - Data, Outreach & Automation
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing influencer marketing agency that connects YouTube creators with brand sponsorships in the tech, gaming, and entertainment industry. 



This is not a typical VA role. You will not be doing one repetitive task. Every day looks different. You might run an automation workflow in the morning, audit an
 inbox before lunch, research YouTube creators in the afternoon, update a large dataset, and draft a client
 before end of day.



We are a small team where everyone delivers. We are looking for someone who works hard, is proactive, reliable, resilient, and delivers on time. If that sounds like you, you are welcome to apply.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



This is not a typical VA role. Every day looks different. In a single day, you might:



- Run automation workflows in n8n and Claude Code (30%)

- Manage large-scale databases in Google Sheets (25%)

- Launch and monitor cold
 and sponsorship outreach campaigns (20%)

- Research YouTube creators using AI tools like Claude and Perplexity (15%)

- Communicate with clients, creators, and agencies. Keep files and systems organized (10%)



You will be one of the key people making things happen - not a number at a big company.





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 3-5 years work experience (this cannot be your first job)

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF, pivot tables, data validation)

- Experience with at least one automation tool (n8n, Zapier, or similar)

- Tech savvy - picks up new tools quickly without hand-holding

- Strong written and spoken English

- Handles multiple types of tasks every day without getting overwhelmed

- Extremely organized, diligent, and reliable

- Delivers on time. Communicates before problems become problems.





WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



- If you have never used any automation tool

- If you prefer doing one type of task all day

- If you are looking for a relaxed, low-pressure role

- If you need to be spoon-fed instructions for everything

- If you struggle with deadlines

- If you are not proactive





WHAT WE OFFER



- ~$500/month, negotiable based on experience

- Work directly with founders on real campaigns with real creators and brands

- Learn n8n, Claude Code, AI tools, and influencer marketing operations

- Growth path to Operations Manager as we scale

- Performance reviews every 3 months



Work setup: 8-10 hrs/day, Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm Dubai time (UTC+4). Fully remote. Time tracking via Toggl. Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power required.





HOW TO APPLY



>>  



Do not use AI to write your answers. We check. AI-written applications are disqualified.

title: AP/AR BOOKKEEPER + VA
description:
We are a Los Angeles, California–based marketing company seeking an experienced, self-motivated, and highly organized Bookkeeper to support our financial operations and administrative needs.



This role includes maintaining accurate financial records and spreadsheets, managing accounts and payment terms, coordinating with vendors, and proactively negotiating favorable terms when appropriate. In addition, you will assist with administrative support tasks such as calendar management, travel coordination, and meeting scheduling.



We are looking for someone who communicates clearly and professionally in a business environment and is confident engaging with vendors and partners. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, dependable, and comfortable taking initiative in a fast-paced, remote setting.



**Schedule:**

Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM (Pacific Time)



**Work Environment:**

You will be connected via Microsoft Teams audio during your shift (camera not required), ensuring consistent collaboration with our team.



If you are a proactive professional who takes ownership of your work and communicates effectively, we encourage you to apply.

title: Senior Performance Video Editor | Meta Ads (UGC & AI Focus)
description:
Welcome to Heroka Cosmetics — a fast-growing e-commerce beauty brand scaling aggressively with paid ads on Meta.



We’re not looking for a “video editor”.

We’re looking for someone who understands performance creative.



Someone who thinks like a marketer, edits like a creative strategist, and produces like a machine.



You’ll be working alongside our Creative Strategist, Media Buyer, Designer, and another Video Editor to continuously test and scale winning creatives.



???? Your mission: produce high-converting ad creatives at speed.



What You'll Do

Edit high-performing video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Create scroll-stopping hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Turn one concept into multiple variations (hooks, angles, formats)

Source and integrate relevant b-roll that enhances the story

Use modern tools and workflows to produce creatives efficiently at scale

Apply captions, motion graphics, and overlays that improve retention

Deliver consistent output of 20+ creatives per week — on time

You Are a Great Fit If You...

Have proven experience editing Meta ad creatives (not just general videos)

Understand why ads convert (hook, retention, pacing, psychology)

Can quickly create multiple variations from one concept

Are highly efficient in your workflow (not just “manual editing”)

Are proficient in CapCut and/or Premiere Pro

Are resourceful and can source your own b-roll

Respect deadlines and communicate proactively

Take ownership, move fast, and don’t need constant direction

?? Important (Read Carefully)



You will be part of a team where your work directly impacts others.



If edits are delayed, it blocks:



The Creative Strategist (who needs to review)

The Media Buyer (who needs to launch ads)



???? This means: meeting deadlines and clear communication are critical.



We value people who:



Deliver on what they promise

Communicate early if something is delayed

Take responsibility for their output



Requirements

Portfolio with Meta ad creatives (mandatory — no portfolio = no review)

Minimum 2+ years experience in e-commerce ad editing

Stable internet + own equipment

Available at least 10 hours per week

A-Player mindset only



Compensation

$10–$20 per video depending on experience, quality, and speed.

Hitrate bonus

Long-term opportunity with room to grow as we scale.



How to Apply



Send us:

Your portfolio (or at least 3 Meta ad creatives you’ve edited)

A short video (60–90 sec) where you explain:

What makes a great hook

How you approach creating multiple variations efficiently



At the top of your application, write: BLUE. Applications that don't start with this word will not be considered, as it shows you have not properly read the application.



We will review your application and reach out via WhatsApp if we see a strong fit.



Applications without the video and portfolio will not be considered.



???? Important Filter

If your workflow relies fully on manual editing without scalable systems, this role is likely not a fit.

title: Customer Service Representative UK - Full Time Job Position
description:
Customer Service Representative



Full-time, remote work. Immediate start. 1-2 people needed for growing team.



***We repost our ad regularly for improved visibility when we have an open position. If you have responded to the work ad once, you do not need to remessage to the latest ad.***



We are an established hardware company looking for Customer Service Representatives to support the growth of our international business. Primary responsibilities include attending to customer queries over
 and WhatsApp instant messages and identifying which products customers should purchase. A successful candidate will be passionate about delivering an enjoyable customer experience, have excellent English written communication skills, very high attention to detail, and the ability to work in an organised manner.



You will not have to voice speak with any customer. All communication will be text-based.



We are looking for people who want to work with us long-term. Consequently, we seek to be a company with a work environment, culture people will also enjoy working with long-term.



Job Responsibilities

- Must be able to work UK work hours Monday to Friday - 8 am until 5 pm and weekend shifts when assigned.

- Other work shift times may be included: Weekend shifts & late UK shifts.

- Daily monitoring of incoming
 & instant messenger customer queries.

- Categorising & labeling customer queries for providing timely & accurate responses.

- Attending customer queries by helping them identify which specific products they should purchase.

- Dialoging with customers and requesting additional information from customers when necessary to help with the product identification process.

- Providing customers with an overall excellent customer experience in regards to timeliness of responses, quality of communication, and the accuracy of purchase advice given.

- Flagging and escalating difficult queries for experienced tea
mbers to follow up.

- Please respond to this job application with 'REF:
in your title so we know that you've read it thoroughly (make sure the reference is in the title itself, not just in the message content).



Experience & Skills

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a customer service role with a track record of providing customers with excellent service.

- Very high attention to detail and interest in learning technical products as well as able to spot even small differences between similar hardware products.

- Highly customer service oriented, positive and pleasant personal disposition.

- Highly organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects and tasks.

- Self-starter who is able to identify, scope, and manage projects from end to end.

- Team player willing and interested in helping other tea
mbers.



Benefits

- Full-time work

- Fully remote work

- Paid annual time off (4 weeks / 20 days)

- 13-month pay bonus when customer service targets are met

- Monthly bonus available: Tea
mbers who have graduated to working independently automatically qualify for a monthly bonus (usually takes about 3-6 months to reach this level)

- Experienced senior tea
mbers able to work independently can be offered flexible working hours or part-time work opportunities.

- Growing CSR team offers career progression and salary increase opportunities through senior tea
mber and training roles.



Hiring process

- 2-3 product identification assignments and a video interview

title: Online Course Helper
description:
I am in need of a candidate to help me copy and paste some data from an online course. Because of this you can work on your other projects at the same time. If this project goes well there will be more more opportunities that involve higher pay.

title: Customer Onboarding & Retention Specialist
description:
***PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE A CUSTOMER SUPPORT REP WITH RETENTION EXPERIENCE - YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED***





THIS ROLE REQUIRES PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED POSITIONS, SUCH AS:



- RETENTION SPECIALIST

- CUSTOMER SUCCESS REPRESENTATIVE

- ACCOUNT MANAGER



APPLICANTS WITH GENERAL CUSTOMER SERVICE POSITIONS WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY REJECTED





About the Position:

We are looking for a Customer Onboarding & Retention Specialist whose primary responsibility is to build strong customer relationships and drive long-term retention. In this role, you will work closely with customers to understand their needs, address concerns, and proactively identify opportunities to enhance their overall experience with our services.



The ideal candidate is highly communicative, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering exceptional customer satisfaction and fostering long-term customer loyalty.



Responsibilities:

• Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with assigned customers

• Serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries, service performance, and concerns

• Monitor customer satisfaction and proactively address issues before they escalate

• Develop and implement strategies to improve customer retention and reduce churn

• Conduct regular check-ins to ensure customer needs and expectations are consistently met

• Collaborate with internal teams to resolve customer concerns efficiently

• Track and analyze customer feedback, identifying trends that may impact retention or service quality

• Support the onboarding of new customers to ensure a smooth transition into active service

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of customer interactions in CRM systems

• Assist with renewal processes and strengthen long-term customer partnerships



Requirements:

• Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written) (MUST)

• Proven experience in Customer Success, Retention, Account Management, Customer Support, or a similar retention-focused role (MUST)

• Proficiency in CRM systems and customer support tools (MUST)

• Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills

• Ability to manage multiple customer relationships simultaneously

• Strong problem-solving skills with keen attention to detail

• Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

• Ability to remain calm, professional, and solution-oriented in challenging situations

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret customer feedback and data



Work Arrangement:

• Full-time position in a work-from-home setup

• 8 hours per shift, 5 days a week

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Customer Service / Data Entry / Business Intern / Marketing
description:
We are a U.S.-based, 10-year Amazon FBA business, looking for a few talented, enthusiastic A-players who have big growth potential within our company. Our initial hourly rate is $3/hr, with weekly payments via PayPal. This is a long-term opportunity with significant growth potential for those who demonstrate the capacity to take on more responsibility and excel in their role.                                      



Prior experience is not required.



However, the ideal candidate should possess the following qualities:



1. Strong independent research skills, with the ability to acquire new knowledge through self-directed learning and thorough investigation.

title: AI Web App Developer — Full Stack (React + Node + Claude API)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are building an AI-powered web app for a well-established online business in the creator space. The business has been operating for 5 years with a large, engaged audience and existing revenue — this is a funded project, not a startup idea.



We need a skilled developer who has genuine experience building AI-powered applications — specifically using large language model APIs (we are using Anthropic Claude). This is not a generic web app build. The core product is AI-driven and the quality of the AI integration is what makes or breaks it.



This is a long-term opportunity. If you are the right person, this role grows with the product.



---



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD



A mobile-first web application with the following core components:



- AI content generation engine using the Anthropic Claude API

- Per-user profile system that stores voice, tone, and preference data to personalise AI outputs over time

- Daily interactive prompt flow — guided questions that feed into AI-generated content

- Image upload and storage

- Social media publishing integration (Buffer or Later API —
 and Instagram)

- User authentication and subscription billing (Stripe)

- Simple database architecture for storing user data, content history, and ideas

-
 platform integration (MailerLite API)



The frontend is React or Next.js. The backend is Node.js or Python — we are open to recommendation. Hosting on Cloudflare or Vercel.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Essential:

- Proven experience building with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar)

- Strong full-stack skills — React frontend, Node.js or Python backend

- Experience with third-party API integrations

- Ability to think about product architecture, not just execute a spec

- Good written English — you will need to communicate clearly with a non-technical founder

- Attention to detail and ability to work independently



Nice to have:

- Experience with Anthropic Claude API specifically

- Experience with Buffer or Later API

- Experience with Stripe subscription billing

- Understanding of prompt engineering and context management



---



WHAT WE ARE NOT LOOKING FOR



We are not looking for someone who will apply without reading this posting carefully. We are not looking for the cheapest option. We are looking for the right person who takes pride in their work and wants to be part of building something genuinely useful from the ground up.



If you are copy-pasting a generic application, please do not apply.



---



HOW TO APPLY



We do not accept applications through OnlineJobs.ph directly.



To be considered, you must complete our application form here:







The form takes approximately 10 minutes. It asks about your relevant experience, your approach to AI app development, and includes a short technical question. Applications submitted outside of this form will not be reviewed.



One last thing... when you fill in the application form, there is a question that asks for a specific word. The word is easel. 



This tells us you read the full posting. Applications without this word in the correct field will be automatically disqualified.



COMPENSATION



Competitive rate based on experience. This is a long-term engagement with room to grow. Please include your expected monthly rate based on part time hours in the application form.



-



We look forward to hearing from serious applicants only.

title: Founding Associate (Global Operations & AI) (bachelor degree)
description:
Build a Global Trading Empire from the South of Manila

Location: Alabang / Muntinlupa Area (Hybrid – Direct collaboration with Founder) Brands: DYTI | Merger Global Trading Websites: 
 (
) | 
 (
)



This is Not a Conventional Role. It is a Launchpad.

Most jobs offer a "narrow box." This role offers the opposite: the chance to be the operational backbone of an international business. We are a Dubai-headquartered operation with production in China and a rapidly expanding global footprint.

As we rebrand and scale, we are building our Global Operations Hub in the Philippines. We aren't just looking for an employee; we are looking for a Founding Associate—a right-hand partner who doesn’t ask "how" but figures it out.

The Profile: The "Technical Architect"

We are looking for a high-performance multitasker who possesses a rare mix of intellectual speed and operational grit.

    •    AI-Native Mindset: You don’t just use ChatGPT; you orchestrate AI tools (Claude, Automation, etc.) to multiply your output. You treat AI as your personal force-multiplier.

    •    Operational Range: You can pivot from reviewing a QC report from a Chinese factory to managing global logistics or building a digital brand presence—all before lunch.

    •    The "Owner" Mentality: You understand that building something global requires intensity. You value results over a clock-out time and take personal pride in every shipment that moves.

    •    Proximity: You are based in or near Alabang/Muntinlupa for high-bandwidth, in-person collaboration with the Founder.



Your Mission (The Daily Grind)

    •    Global Systems: Design and manage the "Operating System" of the company across suppliers, production, and international timelines.

    •    AI Integration: Use automation to eliminate manual work and ensure our small team operates with the power of a multinational corporation.

    •    Logistics & QC: Own the flow of goods. Ensure our seafood (DYTI) and industrial products (Merger) meet world-class standards from factory to customer.

    •    Brand Warfare: Support the growth of a digital presence that reflects a high-performance, global business.

Why This is Different

    1    Direct Access: Work side-by-side with the Founder. You will see exactly how global trade works, from Dubai to China.

    2    No Ceiling: Competitive starting compensation with exponential upside. As the hub grows, your role and rewards grow with it.

    3    Total Impact: You won’t be a cog in a machine. You will be building the machine itself.



How To Apply

Send your application to 
 in PDF format only.

Your application must include:

    1    CV / Profile: Highlighting your education, location, and technical/digital skills.

    2    The "High-Achiever" Statement: Describe a time you solved a complex problem or used AI/tools to gain a massive competitive advantage.

    3    The Commitment: Why are you the right person to step into a high-intensity, founding role right now?



DYTI & Merger Global: We aren't just trading products. We are building the future of global supply chains. Are you ready to build?

title: Sales Appointment Setter
description:
As a Cold Caller, our primary role will be to generate new business leads through cold calling and outreach efforts. You’ll be instrumental in expanding our customer base by identifying and connecting with potential clients in need of our digital marketing services.





## Key Responsibilities

- **Outbound Calling:** Initiate calls to prospective clients using our contact lists, introducing them to Digital Flo's services and value proposition.

- **Lead Qualification:** Engage with decision-makers, qualify leads, and assess their needs to determine if they align with Digital Flo's offerings.

- **Appointment Scheduling:** Schedule follow-up calls or consultations between prospects and the sales team to close deals.

- **Maintain CRM Records:** Accurately log and update lead and prospect information in our CRM system.

- **Achieve Targets:** Meet or exceed monthly lead generation and call volume targets.

- **Feedback Reporting:** Provide feedback to the marketing and sales team about prospects' reactions, objections, and potential areas of improvement.



## Requirements

- **Experience:** Prior experience in cold calling or telesales is preferred, but not required. Experience in a digital marketing environment is a plus.

- **Communication Skills:** Excellent verbal communication and persuasion skills. Ability to establish rapport quickly with potential clients.

- **Resilience:** Ability to handle rejection and stay motivated in a goal-driven environment.

- **Tech-Savvy:** Comfortable using CRM software and other tools for lead tracking and outreach.

- **Time Management:** Strong organizational and time-management skills with the ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently.

- **Self-Starter:** Proactive and driven to meet and exceed goals independently.



Kindly send your updated CV along with a 1-2min self intro. Thank you!

title: GHL Funnel & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a highly capable GoHighLevel Expert and AI Specialist to join our team. This is not a maintenance role — it is a build role. We need someone who can take a vision and execute it from the ground up: full account buildouts, AI agent creation, funnel and landing page development, multi-channel drip campaigns, and the copywriting to power all of it.



The ideal candidate is proactive by nature, understands workflow logic, and has a strong grasp of tonality — matching voice and message to the right audience at the right stage. If you need to be micromanaged to produce results, this is not the role for you. If you thrive on ownership and initiative, keep reading.



Key Responsibilities



- Build out the GoHighLevel account from scratch, including pipelines, custom fields, tags, and CRM architecture tailored to the industry

- Design and develop funnels and landing pages optimized for lead capture and conversion

- Create and configure AI agents and automation workflows within GoHighLevel

- Set up and manage multi-channel drip campaigns using
, SMS, and voice drops

- Write compelling copy for outgoing campaigns, follow-up sequences, and client-facing communications

- Develop a unique, business-specific CRM experience that reflects the client journey in this vertical

- Continuously improve workflows and automation logic based on performance and evolving business needs







Requirements

- Proven experience building GoHighLevel accounts from scratch — not just administering existing setups

- Hands-on experience creating AI agents and automation workflows inside GHL

- Demonstrated copywriting skills across
, SMS, and voice drop formats

- Experience with multi-channel drip campaign setup and sequencing logic

- Strong understanding of funnel and landing page structure for lead generation

- Proactive, self-directed, and capable of working independently with minimal oversight

- Clear understanding of tonality — ability to adapt copy voice to context, audience, and channel







Preferred Skills

- Prior experience building for service-based or lead-driven businesses

- Familiarity with CRM best practices — segmentation, tagging, pipeline stage logic

- Experience with voice drop strategy and any compliance awareness in outbound messaging







Why Join Us?

- Full-time role with real scope — you will own a significant portion of the business infrastructure

- Work directly on a meaningful buildout with clear goals and room to make decisions

- Opportunity to develop deep expertise in a growing, specialized vertical

- A working relationship built on trust, autonomy, and results



If you are ready to build something from the ground up and take full ownership of a specialized GHL and AI implementation, apply now and show us what you can do.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Company Profile :



First Insight is a leading, product-based healthcare technology company serving eye care practices

across the United States. It is headquartered in Sioux Falls, SD, USA. With over 30 years of innovation

and excellence, we support more than 2,000 eye care professionals across the country.



In 1994, we became the first company to introduce a fully integrated EHR, practice management, and

optical management system specifically designed for optometrists and ophthalmologists — setting a new

standard in the industry.



Today, our global team of over 300 professionals spans offices in the U.S. and India. In addition to

cutting-edge Electronic Health Records (EHR) & Practice Management software and AI-driven clinical

and workflow automation, we offer best-in-class Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) services, helping

healthcare practices nationwide optimize their operations and financial health.



Be part of a company that blends deep industry expertise, innovative technology, and a mission to

improve patient care.



To know more, please visit 
.



Job Summary :



The Sales Development Representative (SDR) will be responsible for generating qualified sales meetings

for sales representatives through outbound prospecting and database-driven research.

This role is focused on pipeline creation, not closing — requiring high-volume outreach, strong research

capability, and disciplined execution of multi-channel prospecting strategies (calls,
s, LinkedIn, other

platforms etc.). The SDR will play a critical role in building top-of-funnel pipeline across First Insight’s

product suite — MaximEyes, Fast Pay Health, and EVAA — targeting U.S. eye care practices.



Job Description :



1) Outbound Prospecting & Lead Generation

*Conduct high-volume outbound outreach (calls,
s, LinkedIn, other platforms etc.) to U.S.- based prospects

*Generate qualified meetings and demos for sales representatives

*Build and manage prospect lists using databases and research tools

*Execute structured outreach sequences and cadences

*Maintain daily activity benchmarks (calls,
s, meetings booked etc.)



2) Market Research & Targeting

*Identify high-value target accounts in U.S. healthcare (optometry & ophthalmology practices)

*Use platforms such as ZoomInfo, Lusha, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, etc.

*Understand clinic workflows, patient journey, and operational challenges

*Develop persona-based outreach for decision-makers (practice owners, administrators)



3) CRM & Pipeline Management

*Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce)

*Track outreach activity, responses, and meeting conversions

*Ensure high data accuracy and pipeline hygiene

*Collaborate with marketing on lead qualification and scoring



4) Messaging & Outreach Optimization

*Develop personalized outreach messaging to improve response rates

*Continuously refine
 templates, call scripts, and sequences

*A/B test messaging approaches to improve engagement

*Align messaging with product value propositions and market needs



5) Collaboration with Sales & Marketing

*Work closely with U.S.-based sales representatives to align on target accounts

*Support campaign execution and follow-ups from marketing initiatives

*Provide feedback on lead quality, messaging effectiveness, and market insights

*Contribute to improving SDR playbooks and outreach processes



Job Requirements :



Experience:

*1–4 years of experience in SDR / BDR / inside sales (preferably B2B SaaS)

*Experience in outbound prospecting for U.S. markets preferred

*Proven track record of meeting or exceeding outreach and meeting-booking targets

*Exposure to healthcare, SaaS, or technology sales is a plus



Functional Skills:

*Strong cold calling and
 outreach skills

*Experience with CRM tools (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar)

*Familiarity with sales engagement platforms (Outreach, Salesloft, etc.)

*Experience using data tools (ZoomInfo, 6sense, Lusha, LinkedIn Sales Navigator)

*Ability to research accounts and personalize outreach



Performance Metrics:

*Daily/weekly call and
 activity

*Meetings/demos booked for sales team

*SQL (Sales Qualified Lead) generation

*Conversion rates across outreach stages



Soft Skills:

*Excellent verbal and written English communication (U.S. accent preferred)

*Strong research and analytical thinking

*High energy, persistence, and resilience in outbound sales

*Process-oriented with attention to detail

*Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment
